---
title: "metabolome_data"
documentclass: ctexart
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  word_document: default
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
---
```{r include=FALSE}

#每次都需要来看看是否标准化数据！！！！！！！！！！！

library(data.table)
metabolome_data <- fread("metabolome_data.csv")
View(metabolome_data)
# 将第一列（代谢物名称）设为行名，然后进行转置
transposed_data <- as.data.frame(t(metabolome_data[, -1]))
# 将列名设置为代谢物的名称
colnames(transposed_data) <- metabolome_data$name
# 添加一列 Patient_ID，其值为原来的列名（即患者编号）
transposed_data$Patient_ID <- rownames(transposed_data)
# 将行名重置为简单的数字序列（可选，让数据框更整洁）
rownames(transposed_data) <- NULL
# 重新排列列的顺序，让Patient_ID在第一列
transposed_data <- transposed_data[, c("Patient_ID", metabolome_data$name)]

#删除患者以_PC结尾和QC开头的行
keep_rows <- !grepl("^QC|_PC$", transposed_data$Patient_ID)
transposed_data_cleaned <- transposed_data[keep_rows, ]
#删除分期为0和未随访满3年的人
transposed_data_cleaned <- subset(transposed_data_cleaned, !Patient_ID %in% c("RKJ48", "YHY115", "ZYX188"))
View(transposed_data_cleaned)

#合并代谢和生存数据
metabolome_survival <- fread("metabolome_survival.csv")
merged_data <- merge(x = transposed_data_cleaned,      
                     y = metabolome_survival, 
                     by.x = "Patient_ID",             
                     by.y = "id",                     
                     all.x = TRUE)                     
View(merged_data)
### 对代谢物数据（第2列到第2867列）进行标准化,但是聚类和LASSO部分不需要用，聚类和LASSO分析部分已经设置标准化数据了
#which(colnames(merged_data) == "X2866")
#metabolite_cols <- 2:2867
#merged_data[, metabolite_cols] <- as.data.frame(scale(merged_data[, metabolite_cols]))

merged_data$surgery_date <- as.Date(merged_data$surgery_date)
merged_data$sex <- factor(merged_data$sex)
merged_data$stage <- factor(merged_data$stage)
merged_data$smoking <- factor(merged_data$smoking)
merged_data$alcohol <- factor(merged_data$alcohol)
merged_data$neo_adjuvant_therapy <- factor(merged_data$neo_adjuvant_therapy)
merged_data$perineural_invasion <- factor(merged_data$perineural_invasion)
merged_data$TC <- as.numeric(merged_data$TC)
merged_data$TG <- as.numeric(merged_data$TG)
merged_data$HDL <- as.numeric(merged_data$HDL)
merged_data$LDL <- as.numeric(merged_data$LDL)
merged_data$non_HDL <- as.numeric(merged_data$non_HDL)
merged_data$TG1 <- as.numeric(merged_data$TG1)
merged_data$HDL1 <- as.numeric(merged_data$HDL1)
merged_data$LDL1 <- as.numeric(merged_data$LDL1)
merged_data$new_stage <- as.numeric(merged_data$new_stage)
merged_data$stage_34vs12 <- factor(merged_data$stage_34vs12)
merged_data$Dyslipidemia <- factor(merged_data$Dyslipidemia)
merged_data$bmi2 <- factor(merged_data$bmi2)
merged_data$bmi3 <- factor(merged_data$bmi3)
merged_data$TG2 <- factor(merged_data$TG2)
merged_data$TC2 <- factor(merged_data$TC2)
merged_data$HDL2 <- factor(merged_data$HDL2)
merged_data$LDL2 <- factor(merged_data$LDL2)
merged_data$non_HDL2 <- factor(merged_data$non_HDL2)
summary(merged_data)
fwrite(merged_data,file = "merged_data.csv",row.names = FALSE)
```

#统计描述
```{r}
#正态分布检验 p < 0.05 拒绝原假设，认为不服从正态分布。
shapiro.test(Blood_lipid$non_HDL)
#进一步诊断
par(mfrow=c(1,2))
qqnorm(Blood_lipid$age); qqline(Blood_lipid$age, col="red")
hist(Blood_lipid$age, breaks=30, main="Distribution of age")
# 对数转换后再检验
shapiro.test(log(Blood_lipid$age))


library(tableone)
# 创建要描述的变量列表
my_vars <- c("age", "sex", "bmi", "smoking", "alcohol","new_stage","TG","TC","HDL","LDL","non_HDL")

# 指定分类变量
cat_vars <- c("sex", "smoking", "alcohol", "new_stage")

# 创建表格对象
tab1 <- CreateTableOne(vars = my_vars, 
                       data = merged_data, 
                       factorVars = cat_vars)

# 查看完整表格
print(tab1, 
      showAllLevels = TRUE,  # 显示分类变量的所有水平
      missing = TRUE,         # 显示缺失值信息
      #nonnormal = c("age", "bmi","TG","TC","HDL","LDL","non_HDL") # 指定非正态分布的变量（可不填）
      )        

# 或输出更简洁的版本
print(tab1, 
      catDigits = 1,          # 分类变量百分比的小数位数
      contDigits = 1,         # 连续变量的小数位数
      pDigits = 3,            # p值小数位数（若需组间比较）
      missing = TRUE,         # 显示缺失值信息
      showAllLevels = TRUE,
      #nonnormal = c("age", "bmi","TG","TC","HDL","LDL","non_HDL")
      )
```

#LASSO分析和AUC(212)
```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(survival)
library(glmnet)
library(survminer)
library(timeROC)

# 1. 数据准备与分割,包含临床数据和脂质代谢物数据
data <- merged_data
rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID

# 提取代谢物数据，并且只包含lipid数据
which(colnames(data) == "X2866")
metabolome_data <- data[, 2:2867]
#提取脂质代谢物的列
lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
lipid_data <- metabolome_data[,lipid_columns]

#标准化法脂质数据
lipid_data <- as.data.frame(scale(lipid_data))
summary(lipid_data)

# 临床信息
clinical_data <- data[, 2868:2924]

# lipid_data: 标准化后的脂质代谢物数据（212行，脂质变量列）
# clinical_data: 临床数据，包含dfs_time, dfs, age, sex, new_stage, smoking, bmi

# 准备生存数据
surv_time <- clinical_data$dfs_time  # 生存时间，单位：天
surv_status <- clinical_data$dfs     # 生存状态
surv_obj <- Surv(time = surv_time, event = surv_status)

# 2. LASSO-Cox筛选关键脂质代谢物
# 准备脂质数据矩阵
X_lipids <- as.matrix(lipid_data)

# 运行LASSO-Cox回归
set.seed(123)
lasso_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = X_lipids, 
                       y = surv_obj, 
                       family = "cox", 
                       type.measure = "C",
                       nfolds = 10,
                       alpha = 1)

# LASSO可视化：交叉验证误差图
pdf("lasso_cv_plot.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2) + 0.1)  # 调整边距
plot(lasso_fit, 
     cex.lab = 1.2,    # 坐标轴标签
     cex.axis = 1.0,   # 坐标轴刻度
     cex.main = 1.3)   # 标题
title("LASSO-Cox Cross-Validation Curve", line = 2.5)
dev.off()

# 选择lambda.1se并提取被选中的脂质
best_lambda <- lasso_fit$lambda.1se
lasso_coef <- coef(lasso_fit, s = best_lambda)
selected_lipids <- rownames(lasso_coef)[which(lasso_coef != 0)]
selected_lipids <- selected_lipids[selected_lipids != "(Intercept)"]  # 移除截距项

cat("Number of key lipid metabolites selected by LASSO:", length(selected_lipids), "\n")

# 提取筛选出的脂质数据
if(length(selected_lipids) > 0) {
  lipid_selected_data <- lipid_data[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
} else {
  stop("LASSO did not select any lipid metabolites")
}

# 3. 构建多因素Cox模型
# 准备临床变量
clinical_for_model <- clinical_data[, c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')]
clinical_for_model$sex <- as.factor(clinical_for_model$sex)
clinical_for_model$smoking <- as.factor(clinical_for_model$smoking)
clinical_for_model$new_stage <- as.numeric(clinical_for_model$new_stage)

# 整合数据
final_data <- cbind(lipid_selected_data, clinical_for_model)

# 构建Cox模型
cox_formula <- as.formula(paste("surv_obj ~", paste(colnames(final_data), collapse = " + ")))
final_cox_model <- coxph(cox_formula, data = final_data)

# 模型摘要
cat("\n=== Cox Model Results ===\n")
print(summary(final_cox_model))

# 4. 计算风险评分并分组
final_data$risk_score <- predict(final_cox_model, type = "lp")
median_risk <- median(final_data$risk_score)
final_data$risk_group <- ifelse(final_data$risk_score > median_risk, "High", "Low")

# 5. Kaplan-Meier生存曲线
km_fit <- survfit(surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = final_data)
surv_plot <- ggsurvplot(km_fit, data = final_data,
                        pval = TRUE, 
                        risk.table = TRUE,
                        title = "Kaplan-Meier Curve for Disease-Free Survival (DFS)",
                        xlab = "Time (days)",
                        risk.table.height = 0.25)

pdf("km_survival_plot.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
print(surv_plot)
dev.off()

# 6. 计算1年、3年、5年AUC
# 定义时间点（单位：天）
roc_1year <- timeROC(T = surv_time, 
                     delta = surv_status,
                     marker = final_data$risk_score,
                     cause = 1,
                     times = 365,
                     ROC = TRUE)

roc_3year <- timeROC(T = surv_time,
                     delta = surv_status,
                     marker = final_data$risk_score,
                     cause = 1,
                     times = 1095,
                     ROC = TRUE)

roc_5year <- timeROC(T = surv_time,
                     delta = surv_status,
                     marker = final_data$risk_score,
                     cause = 1,
                     times = 1825,
                     ROC = TRUE)

# 输出AUC结果
cat("\n=== Time-Dependent AUC ===\n")
cat("1-year DFS AUC:", round(roc_1year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("3-year DFS AUC:", round(roc_3year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("5-year DFS AUC:", round(roc_5year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")

# 7. 组合ROC曲线
pdf("roc_all_years.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2) + 0.1)
plot(roc_1year, time = 365, col = "#2E9FDF", lwd = 2,
     main = "Time-Dependent ROC Curves",
     xlab = "1 - Specificity",
     ylab = "Sensitivity",
     cex.lab = 1.2,
     cex.axis = 1.0,
     cex.main = 1.3)
plot(roc_3year, time = 1095, col = "#E7B800", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_5year, time = 1825, col = "#FC4E07", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
grid(col = "gray90", lty = "dotted")
legend("bottomright", 
       legend = c(paste("1-year: AUC =", round(roc_1year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("3-year: AUC =", round(roc_3year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("5-year: AUC =", round(roc_5year$AUC[2], 3))),
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
       lty = 1,
       lwd = 2,
       cex = 1.0,
       bty = "n",
       x.intersp = 0.8,
       y.intersp = 1.2)
dev.off()

# 8. LASSO系数路径图
pdf("lasso_coefficient_path.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2) + 0.1)
plot(lasso_fit$glmnet.fit, xvar = "lambda", 
     cex.lab = 1.2,
     cex.axis = 1.0,
     main = "LASSO Coefficient Path")
dev.off()

# 9. 可选：风险评分分布图
pdf("risk_score_distribution.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2) + 0.1)
hist(final_data$risk_score, 
     breaks = 20,
     main = "Distribution of Risk Scores",
     xlab = "Risk Score",
     ylab = "Frequency",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "black",
     cex.lab = 1.2,
     cex.axis = 1.0,
     cex.main = 1.3)
abline(v = median_risk, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
legend("topright", legend = c(paste("Median =", round(median_risk, 2))), 
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.9)
dev.off()

# 10. 可选：风险评分与生存时间散点图
pdf("risk_score_vs_survival.pdf", width = 8, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2) + 0.1)
plot(final_data$risk_score, surv_time,
     col = ifelse(surv_status == 1, "red", "blue"),
     pch = ifelse(surv_status == 1, 19, 1),
     main = "Risk Score vs Survival Time",
     xlab = "Risk Score",
     ylab = "Survival Time (days)",
     cex.lab = 1.2,
     cex.axis = 1.0,
     cex.main = 1.3)
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("Event", "Censored"),
       col = c("red", "blue"),
       pch = c(19, 1),
       cex = 0.9)
dev.off()

cat("\nAll plots have been saved as PDF files.\n")

```

#LASSO分析和AUC(训练集和验证集)
```{r}
# 1. 数据准备与分割,包含临床数据和脂质代谢物数据
data <- merged_data
rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID
# 按诊断时间排序
data_sorted <- data[order(data$surgery_date), ]
# 设置分割比例
train_ratio <- 0.5  # 训练集占50%
# 计算训练集样本数
n_total <- nrow(data_sorted)
n_train <- round(n_total * train_ratio)
# 按时间顺序分割
train_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]        # 前50%为训练集
test_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] # 后50%为验证集

#训练集和验证集反向验证
#test_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]      
#train_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] 

# 提取代谢物数据，并且只包含lipid数据
which(colnames(train_data) == "X2866")
train_metabolome <- train_data[, 2:2867]
test_metabolome <- test_data[, 2:2867]

lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
#或者提取聚类差异代谢物脂质
#lipid_names <- fread("diff_lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
train_lipids <- train_metabolome[,lipid_columns]
test_lipids<- test_metabolome[,lipid_columns]

#标准化法脂质数据
train_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(train_lipids))
test_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(test_lipids))

# 临床信息
train_clinical <- train_data[, 2868:2924]
test_clinical <- test_data[, 2868:2924]


# 加载必要的包
library(survival)
library(glmnet)
library(survminer)
library(timeROC)
library(gridExtra)
# 1. 数据准备
# 提取生存数据
train_surv_time <- train_clinical$dfs_time
train_surv_status <- train_clinical$dfs
train_surv_obj <- Surv(time = train_surv_time, event = train_surv_status)

test_surv_time <- test_clinical$dfs_time
test_surv_status <- test_clinical$dfs
test_surv_obj <- Surv(time = test_surv_time, event = test_surv_status)

# 2. LASSO-Cox筛选关键脂质代谢物（仅在训练集）
# 准备训练集脂质数据矩阵
X_train_lipids <- as.matrix(train_lipids)

# 运行LASSO-Cox回归
set.seed(123)
lasso_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = X_train_lipids, 
                       y = train_surv_obj, 
                       family = "cox", 
                       type.measure = "C",
                       nfolds = 10,
                       alpha = 1)

# 选择lambda.1se并提取被选中的脂质
best_lambda <- lasso_fit$lambda.1se
lasso_coef <- coef(lasso_fit, s = best_lambda)
selected_lipids <- rownames(lasso_coef)[which(lasso_coef != 0)]

# 移除可能的截距项
selected_lipids <- selected_lipids[selected_lipids != "(Intercept)"]

cat("训练集LASSO筛选出的关键脂质代谢物数量:", length(selected_lipids), "\n")

if(length(selected_lipids) > 0) {
  cat("具体为:", paste(selected_lipids, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  # 提取训练集和验证集的筛选后脂质数据
  train_lipid_selected <- train_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
  test_lipid_selected <- test_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
} else {
  stop("LASSO未筛选出任何脂质代谢物，请检查数据或调整lambda。")
}

# 3. 准备临床变量（训练集和验证集）
# 注意：smoking已编码为0/1，new_stage需要根据情况处理
train_clinical_for_model <- train_clinical[, c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')]
test_clinical_for_model <- test_clinical[, c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')]

# 4. 整合数据
train_final_data <- cbind(train_lipid_selected, train_clinical_for_model)
test_final_data <- cbind(test_lipid_selected, test_clinical_for_model)

# 5. 在训练集上构建Cox模型
cox_formula <- as.formula(paste("train_surv_obj ~", 
                                paste(colnames(train_final_data), collapse = " + ")))
train_cox_model <- coxph(cox_formula, data = train_final_data)

cat("\n=== 训练集Cox模型结果 ===\n")
print(summary(train_cox_model))

# 6. 计算风险评分
# 训练集
train_final_data$risk_score <- predict(train_cox_model, type = "lp")
train_median_risk <- median(train_final_data$risk_score)
train_final_data$risk_group <- ifelse(train_final_data$risk_score > train_median_risk, "High", "Low")

# 验证集（使用训练集的模型参数）
# 注意：验证集需要使用训练集的模型系数和变量进行预测
test_final_data$risk_score <- predict(train_cox_model, newdata = test_final_data, type = "lp")
test_final_data$risk_group <- ifelse(test_final_data$risk_score > train_median_risk, "High", "Low")

# 7. 训练集生存分析
train_km_fit <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data)
train_surv_palette <- c("#fd8d3c","#6baed6")  # 较浅的蓝色、橙色
test_surv_palette <- c("#d94701","#2171b5")  # 较深的蓝色、橙色
train_surv_plot <- ggsurvplot(train_km_fit, data = train_final_data,
                              pval = TRUE, 
                              pval.size = 8,
                              risk.table = TRUE,
                              risk.table.fontsize = 6,
                              palette = train_surv_palette, # 使用较浅的颜色
                              title = "Training set: Kaplan-Meier curve",
                              font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),
                              font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                              font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                              font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),
                              font.legend = c(16, "plain"),
                              xlab = "Time (days)",
                              tables.theme = theme(
                                 axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),   # X轴刻度数字
                                 axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),   # Y轴刻度数字（即风险表的行标签）
                                 axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),  # X轴标题（通常为“Time”）
                                 axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),  # Y轴标题（通常为“Number at risk”）
                                 plot.title = element_text(size = 20,face = "bold")     # 风险表标题
                              ))
train_surv_plot$plot <- train_surv_plot$plot + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

pdf("train_km_survival_plot.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
print(train_surv_plot)
dev.off()



# 8. 验证集生存分析
test_km_fit <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data)
test_surv_plot <- ggsurvplot(test_km_fit, data = test_final_data,
                             pval = TRUE, 
                             pval.size = 8,
                             risk.table = TRUE,
                             risk.table.fontsize = 6, 
                             palette = test_surv_palette,
                             title = "Validation set: Kaplan-Meier curve",
                             font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),
                             font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                             font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                             font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),
                             font.legend = c(16, "plain"),
                             xlab = "Time (days)",
                              tables.theme = theme(
                                  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),   # X轴刻度数字
                                  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),   # Y轴刻度数字（即风险表的行标签）
                                  axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),  # X轴标题（通常为“Time”）
                                  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),  # Y轴标题（通常为“Number at risk”）
                                  plot.title = element_text(size = 20,face = "bold")     # 风险表标题
                              ))
test_surv_plot$plot <- test_surv_plot$plot + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

pdf("test_km_survival_plot.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
print(test_surv_plot)
dev.off()

# 将两个图排列在一个页面
combined_plots <- arrange_ggsurvplots(
  list(train_surv_plot, test_surv_plot),
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1,
  print = FALSE  # 不立即打印
)

# 保存到一个PDF
pdf("combined_km_survival_plots.pdf", width = 20, height = 10)
print(combined_plots)
dev.off()

# 9. 训练集AUC计算
train_roc_1year <- timeROC(T = train_surv_time, 
                           delta = train_surv_status,
                           marker = train_final_data$risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 365,
                           ROC = TRUE)

train_roc_3year <- timeROC(T = train_surv_time,
                           delta = train_surv_status,
                           marker = train_final_data$risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 1095,
                           ROC = TRUE)

train_roc_5year <- timeROC(T = train_surv_time,
                           delta = train_surv_status,
                           marker = train_final_data$risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 1825,
                           ROC = TRUE)

# 10. 验证集AUC计算
test_roc_1year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time, 
                          delta = test_surv_status,
                          marker = test_final_data$risk_score,
                          cause = 1,
                          times = 365,
                          ROC = TRUE)

test_roc_3year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time,
                          delta = test_surv_status,
                          marker = test_final_data$risk_score,
                          cause = 1,
                          times = 1095,
                          ROC = TRUE)

test_roc_5year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time,
                          delta = test_surv_status,
                          marker = test_final_data$risk_score,
                          cause = 1,
                          times = 1825,
                          ROC = TRUE)

# 11. 输出AUC结果
cat("\n=== 训练集时间依赖性AUC ===\n")
cat("1年DFS AUC:", round(train_roc_1year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("3年DFS AUC:", round(train_roc_3year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("5年DFS AUC:", round(train_roc_5year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")

cat("\n=== 验证集时间依赖性AUC ===\n")
cat("1年DFS AUC:", round(test_roc_1year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("3年DFS AUC:", round(test_roc_3year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("5年DFS AUC:", round(test_roc_5year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")

# 12. 绘制训练集和验证集ROC曲线对比
pdf("roc_comparison.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# 训练集ROC
plot(train_roc_1year, time = 365, col = "#2E9FDF", lwd = 2,title = FALSE)
plot(train_roc_3year, time = 1095, col = "#E7B800", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(train_roc_5year, time = 1825, col = "#FC4E07", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
# 使用title()函数添加标题
title(main = "Training set: Time-dependent ROC curve", 
      cex.main = 1.2, font.main = 2, line = 2.5)
legend("bottomright", 
       legend = c(paste("1 year: AUC =", round(train_roc_1year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("3 years: AUC =", round(train_roc_3year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("5 years: AUC =", round(train_roc_5year$AUC[2], 3))),
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
       lty = 1, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

# 验证集ROC
plot(test_roc_1year, time = 365, col = "#2E9FDF", lwd = 2,title = FALSE)
plot(test_roc_3year, time = 1095, col = "#E7B800", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(test_roc_5year, time = 1825, col = "#FC4E07", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
# 使用title()函数添加标题
title(main = "Validation set: Time-dependent ROC curve", 
      cex.main = 1.2, font.main = 2, line = 2.5)
legend("bottomright", 
       legend = c(paste("1 year: AUC =", round(test_roc_1year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("3 years: AUC =", round(test_roc_3year$AUC[2], 3)),
                  paste("5 years: AUC =", round(test_roc_5year$AUC[2], 3))),
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#E7B800", "#FC4E07"),
       lty = 1, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

dev.off()

# 13. LASSO可视化
pdf("lasso_results.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2),mar = c(5, 4, 4, 2) + 0.1, oma = c(0, 0, 2, 0))

# 系数路径图
plot(lasso_fit$glmnet.fit, xvar = "lambda")
title("LASSO Coefficient Path", line = 2.5)
abline(v = -log(best_lambda), col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)

# 交叉验证误差图
plot(lasso_fit)
title("LASSO-Cox Cross-Validation Curve", line = 2.5)
abline(v = -log(best_lambda), col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)

dev.off()

# 14. 风险评分分布对比
pdf("risk_score_distribution_comparison.pdf", width = 12, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

# 训练集风险评分分布
hist(train_final_data$risk_score, 
     breaks = 20,
     main = "Training set: Risk score distribution",
     xlab = "risk score",
     col = "lightblue",
     border = "black")
abline(v = train_median_risk, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
legend("topright", legend = paste("median =", round(train_median_risk, 2)), 
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

# 验证集风险评分分布
hist(test_final_data$risk_score, 
     breaks = 20,
     main = "Validation set: Risk score distribution",
     xlab = "risk score",
     col = "lightgreen",
     border = "black")
abline(v = train_median_risk, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
legend("topright", legend = paste("median =", round(train_median_risk, 2)), 
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)

dev.off()

# 15. 保存关键结果
# 保存筛选出的脂质代谢物
#write.csv(data.frame(Lipid_Metabolites = selected_lipids), "selected_lipid_metabolites.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 保存模型系数
model_coefficients <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(coef(train_cox_model)),
  Coefficient = coef(train_cox_model),
  HR = exp(coef(train_cox_model)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
#write.csv(model_coefficients, "cox_model_coefficients.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 保存训练集和验证集的风险评分
risk_scores <- data.frame(
  Patient_ID = c(rownames(train_final_data), rownames(test_final_data)),
  Dataset = c(rep("Training", nrow(train_final_data)), rep("Validation", nrow(test_final_data))),
  Risk_Score = c(train_final_data$risk_score, test_final_data$risk_score),
  Risk_Group = c(train_final_data$risk_group, test_final_data$risk_group),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
write.csv(risk_scores, "risk_scores_all_patients.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
#LASSO分析和AUC/C—index(训练集和验证集)
```{r}
# ==================== 加载必要的包 ====================
library(survival)
library(glmnet)
library(survminer)
library(timeROC)
library(pROC)  # 用于DeLong检验
library(data.table)
library(survcomp)#用于计算C-index
# ==================== 1. 数据准备与分割 ====================
# 注意：这里假设已经加载了merged_data
data <- merged_data
rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID

# 按诊断时间排序
data_sorted <- data[order(data$surgery_date), ]

# 设置分割比例
train_ratio <- 0.5  # 训练集占50%

# 计算训练集样本数
n_total <- nrow(data_sorted)
n_train <- round(n_total * train_ratio)

# 按时间顺序分割
train_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]        # 前50%为训练集
test_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] # 后50%为验证集

# 训练集和验证集反向验证（可选）
# test_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]      
# train_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] 

# 提取代谢物数据，并且只包含lipid数据
which(colnames(train_data) == "X2866")
train_metabolome <- train_data[, 2:2867]
test_metabolome <- test_data[, 2:2867]

lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
train_lipids <- train_metabolome[,lipid_columns]
test_lipids <- test_metabolome[,lipid_columns]

# 标准化脂质数据
train_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(train_lipids))
test_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(test_lipids))

# 临床信息
train_clinical <- train_data[, 2868:2924]
test_clinical <- test_data[, 2868:2924]

# ==================== 2. 提取生存数据 ====================
train_surv_time <- train_clinical$dfs_time
train_surv_status <- train_clinical$dfs
train_surv_obj <- Surv(time = train_surv_time, event = train_surv_status)

test_surv_time <- test_clinical$dfs_time
test_surv_status <- test_clinical$dfs
test_surv_obj <- Surv(time = test_surv_time, event = test_surv_status)

# ==================== 3. LASSO-Cox筛选关键脂质代谢物（仅在训练集） ====================
# 准备训练集脂质数据矩阵
X_train_lipids <- as.matrix(train_lipids)

# 运行LASSO-Cox回归
set.seed(123)
lasso_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = X_train_lipids, 
                       y = train_surv_obj, 
                       family = "cox", 
                       type.measure = "C",
                       nfolds = 10,
                       alpha = 1)

# 选择lambda.1se并提取被选中的脂质
best_lambda <- lasso_fit$lambda.1se
lasso_coef <- coef(lasso_fit, s = best_lambda)
selected_lipids <- rownames(lasso_coef)[which(lasso_coef != 0)]

# 移除可能的截距项
selected_lipids <- selected_lipids[selected_lipids != "(Intercept)"]

cat("训练集LASSO筛选出的关键脂质代谢物数量:", length(selected_lipids), "\n")

if(length(selected_lipids) > 0) {
  cat("具体为:", paste(selected_lipids, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  # 提取训练集和验证集的筛选后脂质数据
  train_lipid_selected <- train_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
  test_lipid_selected <- test_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
} else {
  stop("LASSO未筛选出任何脂质代谢物，请检查数据或调整lambda。")
}

# ==================== 4. 准备临床变量（训练集和验证集） ====================
# 注意：smoking已编码为0/1，new_stage需要根据情况处理
train_clinical_for_model <- train_clinical[, c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')]
test_clinical_for_model <- test_clinical[, c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')]

# ==================== 5. 构建三种模型 ====================
# 5.1 仅临床模型 (Clinical only)
clinical_vars <- c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')
train_clinical_data <- train_clinical[, clinical_vars]
test_clinical_data <- test_clinical[, clinical_vars]

# 将分类变量转换为因子（确保训练集和验证集因子水平一致）
factor_vars <- c('sex', 'smoking')
for(var in factor_vars) {
  train_clinical_data[[var]] <- as.factor(train_clinical_data[[var]])
  # 验证集使用训练集的因子水平
  test_clinical_data[[var]] <- factor(test_clinical_data[[var]], 
                                      levels = levels(train_clinical_data[[var]]))
}

clinical_cox <- coxph(train_surv_obj ~ ., data = train_clinical_data)

# 5.2 仅脂质模型 (Lipids only)
train_lipid_model_data <- train_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]
test_lipid_model_data <- test_lipids[, selected_lipids, drop = FALSE]

lipids_cox <- coxph(train_surv_obj ~ ., data = train_lipid_model_data)

# 5.3 联合模型 (Combined) - 整合LASSO筛选的脂质和临床变量
train_final_data <- cbind(train_lipid_selected, train_clinical_for_model)
test_final_data <- cbind(test_lipid_selected, test_clinical_for_model)

# 处理联合模型中的因子变量
for(var in factor_vars) {
  train_final_data[[var]] <- as.factor(train_final_data[[var]])
  test_final_data[[var]] <- factor(test_final_data[[var]], 
                                   levels = levels(train_final_data[[var]]))
}

cox_formula <- as.formula(paste("train_surv_obj ~", 
                                paste(colnames(train_final_data), collapse = " + ")))
combined_cox <- coxph(cox_formula, data = train_final_data)

cat("\n=== 训练集Cox模型结果 ===\n")
cat("1. 仅临床模型:\n")
print(summary(clinical_cox))
cat("\n2. 仅脂质模型:\n")
print(summary(lipids_cox))
cat("\n3. 联合模型:\n")
print(summary(combined_cox))

# ==================== 6. 计算各模型风险评分 ====================
# 训练集
train_clinical_data$clinical_score <- predict(clinical_cox, type = "lp")
train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score <- predict(lipids_cox, type = "lp")
train_final_data$combined_score <- predict(combined_cox, type = "lp")

# 验证集（使用训练集模型）
test_clinical_data$clinical_score <- predict(clinical_cox, newdata = test_clinical_data, type = "lp")
test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score <- predict(lipids_cox, newdata = test_lipid_model_data, type = "lp")
test_final_data$combined_score <- predict(combined_cox, newdata = test_final_data, type = "lp")

# 分别计算各模型在训练集的中位数风险阈值
train_clinical_median <- median(train_clinical_data$clinical_score)
train_lipid_median <- median(train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score)
train_combined_median <- median(train_final_data$combined_score)

cat("\n=== 各模型训练集风险评分中位数 ===\n")
cat("临床模型中位数:", round(train_clinical_median, 3), "\n")
cat("脂质模型中位数:", round(train_lipid_median, 3), "\n")
cat("联合模型中位数:", round(train_combined_median, 3), "\n")

# 使用各自模型的中位数进行风险分组
# 训练集
train_clinical_data$risk_group <- ifelse(train_clinical_data$clinical_score > train_clinical_median, "High", "Low")
train_lipid_model_data$risk_group <- ifelse(train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score > train_lipid_median, "High", "Low")
train_final_data$risk_group <- ifelse(train_final_data$combined_score > train_combined_median, "High", "Low")

# 验证集（使用训练集各模型的中位数）
test_clinical_data$risk_group <- ifelse(test_clinical_data$clinical_score > train_clinical_median, "High", "Low")
test_lipid_model_data$risk_group <- ifelse(test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score > train_lipid_median, "High", "Low")
test_final_data$risk_group <- ifelse(test_final_data$combined_score > train_combined_median, "High", "Low")

# ==================== 7. 生存分析（三个模型对比） ====================
# 分别绘制每个模型的生存曲线，避免使用函数导致的错误

# 训练集生存曲线
pdf("train_km_comparison_separate_medians.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)

# 临床模型 - 训练集
train_km_clinical <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ train_clinical_data$risk_group)
train_surv_plot_clinical <- ggsurvplot(train_km_clinical, 
                                       data = train_clinical_data,
                                       pval = TRUE, 
                                       risk.table = TRUE,
                                       title = "Training: Clinical Model",
                                       xlab = "Time (days)",
                                       legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                       #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                       palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                       risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(train_surv_plot_clinical)

# 脂质模型 - 训练集
train_km_lipids <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ train_lipid_model_data$risk_group)
train_surv_plot_lipids <- ggsurvplot(train_km_lipids, 
                                     data = train_lipid_model_data,
                                     pval = TRUE, 
                                     risk.table = TRUE,
                                     title = "Training: Lipids Model",
                                     xlab = "Time (days)",
                                     legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                     #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                     palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                     risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(train_surv_plot_lipids)

# 联合模型 - 训练集
train_km_combined <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ train_final_data$risk_group)
train_surv_plot_combined <- ggsurvplot(train_km_combined, 
                                       data = train_final_data,
                                       pval = TRUE, 
                                       risk.table = TRUE,
                                       title = "Training: Combined Model",
                                       xlab = "Time (days)",
                                       legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                       #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                       palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                       risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(train_surv_plot_combined)

dev.off()

# 验证集生存曲线
pdf("test_km_comparison_separate_medians.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)

# 临床模型 - 验证集
test_km_clinical <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ test_clinical_data$risk_group)
test_surv_plot_clinical <- ggsurvplot(test_km_clinical, 
                                      data = test_clinical_data,
                                      pval = TRUE, 
                                      risk.table = TRUE,
                                      title = "Validation: Clinical Model",
                                      xlab = "Time (days)",
                                      legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                      #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                      palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                      risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(test_surv_plot_clinical)

# 脂质模型 - 验证集
test_km_lipids <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ test_lipid_model_data$risk_group)
test_surv_plot_lipids <- ggsurvplot(test_km_lipids, 
                                    data = test_lipid_model_data,
                                    pval = TRUE, 
                                    risk.table = TRUE,
                                    title = "Validation: Lipids Model",
                                    xlab = "Time (days)",
                                    legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                    #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                    palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                    risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(test_surv_plot_lipids)

# 联合模型 - 验证集
test_km_combined <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ test_final_data$risk_group)
test_surv_plot_combined <- ggsurvplot(test_km_combined, 
                                      data = test_final_data,
                                      pval = TRUE, 
                                      risk.table = TRUE,
                                      title = "Validation: Combined Model",
                                      xlab = "Time (days)",
                                      legend.title = "Risk Group",
                                      #legend.labs = c("Low", "High"),
                                      palette = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"),
                                      risk.table.height = 0.25)
print(test_surv_plot_combined)

dev.off()

# 将三个训练集模型放在一个图中比较（可选）
pdf("train_km_side_by_side.pdf", width = 18, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# 临床模型
train_km_clinical <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_clinical_data)
plot(train_km_clinical, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Clinical Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_clinical <- surv_pvalue(survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_clinical_data), 
                             data = train_clinical_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_clinical, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

# 脂质模型
train_km_lipids <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_lipid_model_data)
plot(train_km_lipids, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Lipids Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_lipids <- surv_pvalue(survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_lipid_model_data), 
                           data = train_lipid_model_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_lipids, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

# 联合模型
train_km_combined <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data)
plot(train_km_combined, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Combined Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_combined <- surv_pvalue(survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data), 
                             data = train_final_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_combined, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

dev.off()

# 将三个验证集模型放在一个图中比较（可选）
pdf("test_km_side_by_side.pdf", width = 18, height = 6)
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))

# 临床模型
test_km_clinical <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_clinical_data)
plot(test_km_clinical, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Clinical Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_clinical_test <- surv_pvalue(survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_clinical_data), 
                                  data = test_clinical_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_clinical_test, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

# 脂质模型
test_km_lipids <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_lipid_model_data)
plot(test_km_lipids, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Lipids Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_lipids_test <- surv_pvalue(survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_lipid_model_data), 
                                data = test_lipid_model_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_lipids_test, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

# 联合模型
test_km_combined <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data)
plot(test_km_combined, 
     col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Combined Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07"), 
       lwd = 2, 
       bty = "n")

# 添加p值 - 使用公式形式指定数据
pval_combined_test <- surv_pvalue(survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data), 
                                  data = test_final_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, 
     y = 0.9, 
     labels = paste("p =", format(pval_combined_test, digits = 3)), 
     cex = 1.2)

dev.off()


#将训练集和验证集6个模型评分生存曲线放在一个图形中

pdf("6个模型评分生存曲线.pdf", width = 18, height = 12)
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 4, 2), oma = c(0, 0, 2, 0))

# 颜色设置
colors <- c("#2E9FDF", "#FC4E07")  # 蓝:低风险, 红:高风险

# p值格式化函数
format_pvalue <- function(p) {
  if (p < 0.001) {
    return("p < 0.001")
  } else {
    return(paste("p =", sprintf("%.3f", p)))
  }
}

# 第1行：训练集

# 1. 临床模型（训练集）
train_km_clinical <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_clinical_data)
plot(train_km_clinical, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Clinical Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_clinical <- surv_pvalue(train_km_clinical, data = train_clinical_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_clinical), cex = 1.1)

# 2. 脂质模型（训练集）
train_km_lipids <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_lipid_model_data)
plot(train_km_lipids, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Lipids Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_lipids <- surv_pvalue(train_km_lipids, data = train_lipid_model_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_lipids), cex = 1.1)

# 3. 联合模型（训练集）
train_km_combined <- survfit(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data)
plot(train_km_combined, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Training: Combined Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_combined <- surv_pvalue(train_km_combined, data = train_final_data)$pval
text(x = max(train_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_combined), cex = 1.1)

#第2行：验证集

# 4. 临床模型（验证集）
test_km_clinical <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_clinical_data)
plot(test_km_clinical, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Clinical Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_clinical_test <- surv_pvalue(test_km_clinical, data = test_clinical_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_clinical_test), cex = 1.1)

# 5. 脂质模型（验证集）
test_km_lipids <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_lipid_model_data)
plot(test_km_lipids, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Lipids Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_lipids_test <- surv_pvalue(test_km_lipids, data = test_lipid_model_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_lipids_test), cex = 1.1)

# 6. 联合模型（验证集）
test_km_combined <- survfit(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data)
plot(test_km_combined, 
     col = colors, 
     lwd = 2,
     main = "Validation: Combined Model",
     xlab = "Time (days)",
     ylab = "Survival Probability")
legend("topright", legend = c("High Risk", "Low Risk"), 
       col = rev(colors), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
pval_combined_test <- surv_pvalue(test_km_combined, data = test_final_data)$pval
text(x = max(test_surv_time)*0.7, y = 0.9, 
     labels = format_pvalue(pval_combined_test), cex = 1.1)

# 添加总标题
mtext("Kaplan-Meier Survival Curves Comparison", 
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.3, font = 2, line = 0.5)

dev.off()



# 创建生存分析结果汇总表
# 使用survdiff函数计算p值，避免surv_pvalue的数据问题
survival_summary <- data.frame(
  Dataset = rep(c("Training", "Validation"), each = 3),
  Model = rep(c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"), 2),
  LowRisk_Events = c(
    sum(train_surv_status[train_clinical_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1),
    sum(train_surv_status[train_lipid_model_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1),
    sum(train_surv_status[train_final_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_clinical_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_lipid_model_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_final_data$risk_group == "Low"] == 1)
  ),
  HighRisk_Events = c(
    sum(train_surv_status[train_clinical_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1),
    sum(train_surv_status[train_lipid_model_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1),
    sum(train_surv_status[train_final_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_clinical_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_lipid_model_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1),
    sum(test_surv_status[test_final_data$risk_group == "High"] == 1)
  ),
  P_Value = c(
    # 使用survdiff计算p值
    pchisq(survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_clinical_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
    pchisq(survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_lipid_model_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
    pchisq(survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
    pchisq(survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_clinical_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
    pchisq(survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_lipid_model_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE),
    pchisq(survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data)$chisq, df = 1, lower.tail = FALSE)
  )
)

cat("\n=== 生存分析结果汇总 ===\n")
print(survival_summary)

# 保存生存分析结果
#write.csv(survival_summary, "survival_analysis_summary_separate_medians.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 可选：使用log-rank检验计算p值（另一种方法）
cat("\n=== Log-rank检验结果 ===\n")
cat("训练集临床模型: p =", 
    survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_clinical_data)$pvalue, "\n")
cat("训练集脂质模型: p =", 
    survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_lipid_model_data)$pvalue, "\n")
cat("训练集联合模型: p =", 
    survdiff(train_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = train_final_data)$pvalue, "\n")
cat("验证集临床模型: p =", 
    survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_clinical_data)$pvalue, "\n")
cat("验证集脂质模型: p =", 
    survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_lipid_model_data)$pvalue, "\n")
cat("验证集联合模型: p =", 
    survdiff(test_surv_obj ~ risk_group, data = test_final_data)$pvalue, "\n")

# # ==================== 8. 计算各模型AUC ====================
# 定义计算AUC的函数
calculate_auc <- function(surv_time, surv_status, risk_scores, times) {
  auc_results <- numeric(length(times))
  for(i in seq_along(times)) {
    roc_result <- timeROC(T = surv_time, delta = surv_status,
                          marker = risk_scores, cause = 1,
                          times = times[i], ROC = TRUE)
    auc_results[i] <- roc_result$AUC[2]
  }
  return(auc_results)
}

# 设置时间点
time_points <- c(365, 1095, 1825)  # 1年, 3年, 5年

# 训练集AUC
train_auc <- data.frame(
  Time = time_points,
  Clinical = calculate_auc(train_surv_time, train_surv_status, 
                           train_clinical_data$clinical_score, time_points),
  Lipids = calculate_auc(train_surv_time, train_surv_status,
                         train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, time_points),
  Combined = calculate_auc(train_surv_time, train_surv_status,
                           train_final_data$combined_score, time_points)
)

# 验证集AUC
test_auc <- data.frame(
  Time = time_points,
  Clinical = calculate_auc(test_surv_time, test_surv_status,
                           test_clinical_data$clinical_score, time_points),
  Lipids = calculate_auc(test_surv_time, test_surv_status,
                         test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, time_points),
  Combined = calculate_auc(test_surv_time, test_surv_status,
                           test_final_data$combined_score, time_points)
)

# ==================== 9. 输出AUC结果 ====================
cat("\n=== 训练集各模型AUC比较（各自中位数分组） ===\n")
print(train_auc)

cat("\n=== 验证集各模型AUC比较（各自中位数分组） ===\n")
print(test_auc)

# 创建AUC汇总表格
auc_summary <- data.frame(
  Dataset = rep(c("Training", "Validation"), each = 3),
  Model = rep(c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"), 2),
  AUC_1yr = c(train_auc[1, -1], test_auc[1, -1]),
  AUC_3yr = c(train_auc[2, -1], test_auc[2, -1]),
  AUC_5yr = c(train_auc[3, -1], test_auc[3, -1])
)

cat("\n=== AUC汇总表（各自中位数分组） ===\n")
print(auc_summary)

# 保存汇总表
#write.csv(auc_summary, "auc_summary_table_separate_medians.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ==================== 10. 绘制综合ROC对比图 ====================
pdf("model_comparison_roc.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
par(mfrow = c(2, 3), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1), oma = c(0, 0, 2, 0))

colors <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A")
models <- c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")

# 第1行：训练集（3个时间点）
for(t_idx in 1:length(time_points)) {
  time <- time_points[t_idx]
  
  plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
       xlab = "1 - Specificity", ylab = "Sensitivity",
       main = paste0("Training: ", time/365, "-Year ROC"))
  
  for(m_idx in 1:length(models)) {
    model <- models[m_idx]
    risk_scores <- switch(model,
                          "Clinical" = train_clinical_data$clinical_score,
                          "Lipids" = train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score,
                          "Combined" = train_final_data$combined_score)
    
    roc <- timeROC(T = train_surv_time, delta = train_surv_status,
                   marker = risk_scores, cause = 1,
                   times = time, ROC = TRUE)
    
    lines(roc$FP[, 2], roc$TP[, 2], 
          col = colors[m_idx], lwd = 2, lty = 1)
  }
  
  legend("bottomright", legend = paste0(models, " (AUC: ", 
                                        round(c(train_auc[t_idx, "Clinical"], 
                                                train_auc[t_idx, "Lipids"], 
                                                train_auc[t_idx, "Combined"]), 3), ")"),
         col = colors, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)
}

# 第2行：验证集（3个时间点）
for(t_idx in 1:length(time_points)) {
  time <- time_points[t_idx]
  
  plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1),
       xlab = "1 - Specificity", ylab = "Sensitivity",
       main = paste0("Validation: ", time/365, "-Year ROC"))
  
  for(m_idx in 1:length(models)) {
    model <- models[m_idx]
    risk_scores <- switch(model,
                          "Clinical" = test_clinical_data$clinical_score,
                          "Lipids" = test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score,
                          "Combined" = test_final_data$combined_score)
    
    roc <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time, delta = test_surv_status,
                   marker = risk_scores, cause = 1,
                   times = time, ROC = TRUE)
    
    lines(roc$FP[, 2], roc$TP[, 2], 
          col = colors[m_idx], lwd = 2, lty = 1)
  }
  
  legend("bottomright", legend = paste0(models, " (AUC: ", 
                                        round(c(test_auc[t_idx, "Clinical"], 
                                                test_auc[t_idx, "Lipids"], 
                                                test_auc[t_idx, "Combined"]), 3), ")"),
         col = colors, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)
}

mtext("ROC curve comparison of models", 
      outer = TRUE, cex = 1.2, font = 2)
dev.off()

# ==================== 11. 统计检验（模型间AUC差异） ====================
# 比较模型间AUC差异（DeLong检验）
cat("\n=== 训练集1年AUC DeLong检验（各自中位数分组）===\n")

# 以1年AUC为例，比较训练集上各模型
train_roc_objects <- list()
for(model in models) {
  risk_scores <- switch(model,
                        "Clinical" = train_clinical_data$clinical_score,
                        "Lipids" = train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score,
                        "Combined" = train_final_data$combined_score)
  
  # 创建ROC对象（用于DeLong检验）
  binary_status <- ifelse(train_surv_time <= 365 & train_surv_status == 1, 1, 0)
  train_roc_objects[[model]] <- roc(binary_status ~ risk_scores)
}

# 执行成对DeLong检验
cat("Clinical vs Lipids:\n")
print(roc.test(train_roc_objects$Clinical, train_roc_objects$Lipids))

cat("\nClinical vs Combined:\n")
print(roc.test(train_roc_objects$Clinical, train_roc_objects$Combined))

cat("\nLipids vs Combined:\n")
print(roc.test(train_roc_objects$Lipids, train_roc_objects$Combined))

# ==================== 12. 风险评分分布对比 ====================
pdf("risk_score_distribution.pdf", width = 12, height = 12)
par(mfrow = c(3, 2))

# 定义绘制分布的函数
plot_risk_distribution <- function(risk_scores, median_risk, dataset_name, model_name, color) {
  hist(risk_scores, 
       breaks = 20,
       main = paste0(dataset_name, ": ", model_name, " Model Risk Scores"),
       xlab = "Risk Score",
       col = color,
       border = "black")
  abline(v = median_risk, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
  legend("topright", legend = paste("Median =", round(median_risk, 3)), 
         col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2, cex = 0.8)
}

# 训练集风险评分分布
plot_risk_distribution(train_clinical_data$clinical_score, 
                       train_clinical_median, 
                       "Training", "Clinical", "lightblue")
# 验证集风险评分分布（使用训练集中位数作为参考线）
plot_risk_distribution(test_clinical_data$clinical_score, 
                       train_clinical_median, 
                       "Validation", "Clinical", "lightblue")

plot_risk_distribution(train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, 
                       train_lipid_median, 
                       "Training", "Lipids", "lightgreen")

plot_risk_distribution(test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, 
                       train_lipid_median, 
                       "Validation", "Lipids", "lightgreen")


plot_risk_distribution(train_final_data$combined_score, 
                       train_combined_median, 
                       "Training", "Combined", "lightcoral")

plot_risk_distribution(test_final_data$combined_score, 
                       train_combined_median, 
                       "Validation", "Combined", "lightcoral")

# 验证集风险评分分布（使用训练集中位数作为参考线）
#plot_risk_distribution(test_clinical_data$clinical_score, 
                       #train_clinical_median, 
                       #"Validation", "Clinical", "lightblue")

#plot_risk_distribution(test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, 
                       #train_lipid_median, 
                      # "Validation", "Lipids", "lightgreen")

#plot_risk_distribution(test_final_data$combined_score, 
                       #train_combined_median, 
                       #"Validation", "Combined", "lightcoral")

dev.off()

# ==================== 13. 风险分组统计 ====================
# 统计各模型在训练集和验证集的风险分组情况
risk_group_stats <- data.frame(
  Dataset = character(),
  Model = character(),
  Low_Risk_Count = integer(),
  High_Risk_Count = integer(),
  Low_Risk_Percent = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# 训练集统计
for(model_name in c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")) {
  risk_groups <- switch(model_name,
                        "Clinical" = train_clinical_data$risk_group,
                        "Lipids" = train_lipid_model_data$risk_group,
                        "Combined" = train_final_data$risk_group)
  
  low_count <- sum(risk_groups == "Low")
  high_count <- sum(risk_groups == "High")
  total <- low_count + high_count
  
  risk_group_stats <- rbind(risk_group_stats, 
                            data.frame(
                              Dataset = "Training",
                              Model = model_name,
                              Low_Risk_Count = low_count,
                              High_Risk_Count = high_count,
                              Low_Risk_Percent = round(low_count/total * 100, 1)
                            ))
}

# 验证集统计
for(model_name in c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")) {
  risk_groups <- switch(model_name,
                        "Clinical" = test_clinical_data$risk_group,
                        "Lipids" = test_lipid_model_data$risk_group,
                        "Combined" = test_final_data$risk_group)
  
  low_count <- sum(risk_groups == "Low")
  high_count <- sum(risk_groups == "High")
  total <- low_count + high_count
  
  risk_group_stats <- rbind(risk_group_stats, 
                            data.frame(
                              Dataset = "Validation",
                              Model = model_name,
                              Low_Risk_Count = low_count,
                              High_Risk_Count = high_count,
                              Low_Risk_Percent = round(low_count/total * 100, 1)
                            ))
}

cat("\n=== 风险分组统计（各自中位数分组） ===\n")
print(risk_group_stats)

# 保存风险分组统计
#write.csv(risk_group_stats, "risk_group_stats_separate_medians.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ==================== 14. 保存关键结果 ====================
# 保存各模型中位数
median_thresholds <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"),
  Median_Threshold = c(train_clinical_median, train_lipid_median, train_combined_median)
)
#write.csv(median_thresholds, "median_thresholds_separate_medians.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 保存各模型系数
save_model_coefficients <- function(model, model_name) {
  coef_df <- data.frame(
    Variable = names(coef(model)),
    Coefficient = coef(model),
    HR = exp(coef(model)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write.csv(coef_df, paste0(model_name, "_coefficients_separate.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

save_model_coefficients(clinical_cox, "clinical")
save_model_coefficients(lipids_cox, "lipids")
save_model_coefficients(combined_cox, "combined")

# 保存训练集和验证集的风险评分
risk_scores_all <- data.frame(
  Patient_ID = c(rownames(train_clinical_data), rownames(test_clinical_data)),
  Dataset = c(rep("Training", nrow(train_clinical_data)), 
              rep("Validation", nrow(test_clinical_data))),
  Clinical_Score = c(train_clinical_data$clinical_score, test_clinical_data$clinical_score),
  Lipids_Score = c(train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score, test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score),
  Combined_Score = c(train_final_data$combined_score, test_final_data$combined_score),
  Clinical_Group = c(train_clinical_data$risk_group, test_clinical_data$risk_group),
  Lipids_Group = c(train_lipid_model_data$risk_group, test_lipid_model_data$risk_group),
  Combined_Group = c(train_final_data$risk_group, test_final_data$risk_group),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

#write.csv(risk_scores_all, "risk_scores_all_patients.csv", row.names = FALSE)


# ==================== 计算整体C-index ====================
cat("\n=== 计算整体C-index ===\n")

# 计算整体C-index的函数
calculate_overall_cindex <- function(model_cox, data, surv_time, surv_status) {
  # 计算风险评分
  risk_scores <- predict(model_cox, newdata = data, type = "lp")
  
  # 使用survcomp包计算整体C-index
  cindex_obj <- survcomp::concordance.index(x = risk_scores,
                                            surv.time = surv_time,
                                            surv.event = surv_status,
                                            method = "noether")
  
  return(cindex_obj$c.index)
}

# 训练集整体C-index
train_cindex_overall <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"),
  Cindex = c(
    calculate_overall_cindex(clinical_cox, train_clinical_data, 
                             train_surv_time, train_surv_status),
    calculate_overall_cindex(lipids_cox, train_lipid_model_data,
                             train_surv_time, train_surv_status),
    calculate_overall_cindex(combined_cox, train_final_data,
                             train_surv_time, train_surv_status)
  ),
  Dataset = "Training"
)

# 验证集整体C-index
test_cindex_overall <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"),
  Cindex = c(
    calculate_overall_cindex(clinical_cox, test_clinical_data,
                             test_surv_time, test_surv_status),
    calculate_overall_cindex(lipids_cox, test_lipid_model_data,
                             test_surv_time, test_surv_status),
    calculate_overall_cindex(combined_cox, test_final_data,
                             test_surv_time, test_surv_status)
  ),
  Dataset = "Validation"
)

# 合并结果
overall_cindex_results <- rbind(train_cindex_overall, test_cindex_overall)

# 输出结果
cat("\n=== 整体C-index结果 ===\n")
print(overall_cindex_results)

# 保存结果
write.csv(overall_cindex_results, "overall_cindex_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ==================== 可视化整体C-index ====================
pdf("overall_cindex_comparison.pdf", width = 10, height = 6)
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))

# 准备数据
models <- c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")
train_values <- train_cindex_overall$Cindex
test_values <- test_cindex_overall$Cindex

# 设置图形参数
bar_positions <- barplot(height = rbind(train_values, test_values),
                         beside = TRUE,
                         names.arg = models,
                         col = c("#4DAF4A", "#377EB8"),
                         ylim = c(0, 1),
                         ylab = "Overall C-index",
                         main = "Overall C-index Comparison",
                         cex.names = 1.2,
                         cex.lab = 1.2)

# 添加数值标签
text(x = bar_positions[1,], y = train_values + 0.02,
     labels = sprintf("%.3f", train_values), cex = 1.1)
text(x = bar_positions[2,], y = test_values + 0.02,
     labels = sprintf("%.3f", test_values), cex = 1.1)

# 添加图例
legend("topright", legend = c("Training", "Validation"),
       fill = c("#4DAF4A", "#377EB8"), cex = 1.1)

# 添加网格线
#grid(nx = NA, ny = NULL, lty = 2, col = "gray90")

dev.off()



# ==================== 时间依赖C-index计算 ====================
cat("\n=== 计算时间依赖C-index ===\n")

# 设置时间点
cindex_times <- c(365, 1095, 1825)  # 1年, 3年, 5年

# 计算时间依赖C-index的函数
calculate_td_cindex <- function(model_cox, data, surv_time, surv_status, times) {
  # 计算风险评分
  risk_scores <- predict(model_cox, newdata = data, type = "lp")
  
  cindex_results <- numeric(length(times))
  
  for(i in seq_along(times)) {
    # 创建截断的生存数据
    truncated_time <- pmin(surv_time, times[i])
    truncated_status <- surv_status
    truncated_status[surv_time > times[i]] <- 0  # 超过该时间点的视为删失
    
    # 使用survcomp包计算C-index
    cindex_obj <- survcomp::concordance.index(x = risk_scores,
                                              surv.time = truncated_time,
                                              surv.event = truncated_status,
                                              method = "noether")
    
    cindex_results[i] <- cindex_obj$c.index
  }
  
  return(cindex_results)
}

# 训练集C-index
train_cindex <- data.frame(
  Time = cindex_times,
  Clinical = calculate_td_cindex(clinical_cox, train_clinical_data, 
                                 train_surv_time, train_surv_status, cindex_times),
  Lipids = calculate_td_cindex(lipids_cox, train_lipid_model_data,
                               train_surv_time, train_surv_status, cindex_times),
  Combined = calculate_td_cindex(combined_cox, train_final_data,
                                 train_surv_time, train_surv_status, cindex_times)
)

# 验证集C-index
test_cindex <- data.frame(
  Time = cindex_times,
  Clinical = calculate_td_cindex(clinical_cox, test_clinical_data,
                                 test_surv_time, test_surv_status, cindex_times),
  Lipids = calculate_td_cindex(lipids_cox, test_lipid_model_data,
                               test_surv_time, test_surv_status, cindex_times),
  Combined = calculate_td_cindex(combined_cox, test_final_data,
                                 test_surv_time, test_surv_status, cindex_times)
)

# 输出结果
cat("\n=== 训练集时间依赖C-index ===\n")
print(train_cindex)

cat("\n=== 验证集时间依赖C-index ===\n")
print(test_cindex)

# 保存结果
#write.csv(train_cindex, "train_time_dependent_cindex.csv", row.names = FALSE)
#write.csv(test_cindex, "test_time_dependent_cindex.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# ==================== 绘制C-index对比图 ====================
pdf("time_dependent_cindex_comparison.pdf", width = 14, height = 7)
par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(5, 5, 4, 2))

# 颜色设置
colors <- c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#4DAF4A")
models <- c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")

# 训练集
plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0.5, 3.5), ylim = c(0.5, 1.0),
     xlab = "Time (Years)", ylab = "C-index",
     main = "Training Set", xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = c("1", "3", "5"))

for(m_idx in 1:length(models)) {
  model <- models[m_idx]
  cindex_values <- train_cindex[[model]]
  
  lines(1:3, cindex_values, 
        type = "b", col = colors[m_idx], lwd = 2, pch = 16, cex = 1.2)
  
   for(i in 1:3) {
  text(i, cindex_values[i] + 0.01, 
      sprintf("%.3f", cindex_values[i]), 
col = colors[m_idx], cex = 0.9)
 }
}



legend("bottomright", legend = models, col = colors, lwd = 2, pch = 16)

# 验证集
plot(1, type = "n", xlim = c(0.5, 3.5), ylim = c(0.5, 1.0),
     xlab = "Time (Years)", ylab = "C-index",
     main = "Validation Set", xaxt = "n")
axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = c("1", "3", "5"))

for(m_idx in 1:length(models)) {
  model <- models[m_idx]
  cindex_values <- test_cindex[[model]]
  
  lines(1:3, cindex_values, 
        type = "b", col = colors[m_idx], lwd = 2, pch = 16, cex = 1.2)
  
  for(i in 1:3) {
    text(i, cindex_values[i] + 0.01, 
         sprintf("%.3f", cindex_values[i]), 
         col = colors[m_idx], cex = 0.9)
  }
}
legend("bottomright", legend = models, col = colors, lwd = 2, pch = 16)

mtext("Time-dependent C-index Comparison", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.2, font = 2, line = -1.5)
dev.off()

# ==================== 性能汇总 ====================
# 创建综合性能表
performance_summary <- data.frame(
  Dataset = rep(c("Training", "Validation"), each = 3),
  Model = rep(c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined"), 2),
  AUC_1yr = c(train_auc$Clinical[1], train_auc$Lipids[1], train_auc$Combined[1],
              test_auc$Clinical[1], test_auc$Lipids[1], test_auc$Combined[1]),
  AUC_3yr = c(train_auc$Clinical[2], train_auc$Lipids[2], train_auc$Combined[2],
              test_auc$Clinical[2], test_auc$Lipids[2], test_auc$Combined[2]),
  AUC_5yr = c(train_auc$Clinical[3], train_auc$Lipids[3], train_auc$Combined[3],
              test_auc$Clinical[3], test_auc$Lipids[3], test_auc$Combined[3]),
  Cindex_1yr = c(train_cindex$Clinical[1], train_cindex$Lipids[1], train_cindex$Combined[1],
                 test_cindex$Clinical[1], test_cindex$Lipids[1], test_cindex$Combined[1]),
  Cindex_3yr = c(train_cindex$Clinical[2], train_cindex$Lipids[2], train_cindex$Combined[2],
                 test_cindex$Clinical[2], test_cindex$Lipids[2], test_cindex$Combined[2]),
  Cindex_5yr = c(train_cindex$Clinical[3], train_cindex$Lipids[3], train_cindex$Combined[3],
                 test_cindex$Clinical[3], test_cindex$Lipids[3], test_cindex$Combined[3])
)

cat("\n=== 综合性能汇总表 ===\n")
print(performance_summary)
write.csv(performance_summary, "AUC_vs_Cindex135.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n时间依赖C-index计算完成！\n")
#以上结束


#==========补充DeLong检验==========
# 加载必要包
library(pROC)

# 定义时间点
time_points <- c(365, 1095, 1825)
models <- c("Clinical", "Lipids", "Combined")

# 创建存储结果的列表
deLong_results <- list()

for (dataset in c("Train", "Test")) {
  if (dataset == "Train") {
    surv_time <- train_surv_time
    surv_status <- train_surv_status
    risk_scores_list <- list(
      Clinical = train_clinical_data$clinical_score,
      Lipids = train_lipid_model_data$lipid_score,
      Combined = train_final_data$combined_score
    )
  } else {
    surv_time <- test_surv_time
    surv_status <- test_surv_status
    risk_scores_list <- list(
      Clinical = test_clinical_data$clinical_score,
      Lipids = test_lipid_model_data$lipid_score,
      Combined = test_final_data$combined_score
    )
  }
  
  cat("\n========== ", dataset, "Set ==========\n")
  
  # 对每个时间点进行DeLong检验
  for (t in time_points) {
    cat("\n--- Time:", t/365, "years ---\n")
    
    # 创建二分类结局（在该时间点是否发生事件）
    binary_status <- ifelse(surv_time <= t & surv_status == 1, 1, 0)
    
    # 生成ROC对象
    roc_list <- list()
    for (model in models) {
      roc_list[[model]] <- roc(binary_status ~ risk_scores_list[[model]])
    }
    
    # 成对比较
    cat("Clinical vs Lipids:\n")
    print(roc.test(roc_list$Clinical, roc_list$Lipids))
    cat("\nClinical vs Combined:\n")
    print(roc.test(roc_list$Clinical, roc_list$Combined))
    cat("\nLipids vs Combined:\n")
    print(roc.test(roc_list$Lipids, roc_list$Combined))
  }
}


#混合模型：脂质系数固定（训练集），临床系数重新拟合（验证集）
# ===== 混合模型：脂质系数固定（训练集），临床系数重新拟合（验证集） =====

# 10.5.1 从训练集模型中提取脂质变量的系数
train_coef <- coef(train_cox_model)
# 找出哪些是脂质变量（根据筛选出的脂质变量名）
lipid_vars <- selected_lipids
clinical_vars <- c('age', 'sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking', 'bmi')

# 提取脂质系数
lipid_coef <- train_coef[names(train_coef) %in% lipid_vars]

# 10.5.2 计算验证集的脂质部分风险评分（固定系数）
# 确保验证集有相同的脂质变量
test_lipid_data_for_mixed <- test_lipid_selected[, names(lipid_coef)]
# 计算脂质部分线性预测
test_lipid_part <- as.matrix(test_lipid_data_for_mixed) %*% lipid_coef

# 10.5.3 在验证集上重新拟合临床变量（不含脂质）
# 使用相同的临床变量
test_clinical_for_mixed <- test_clinical_for_model[, clinical_vars]

# 处理分类变量 - 与训练集保持一致
# 假设训练集中的分类变量已经正确处理
# 我们可以从训练集的临床数据中获取因子水平
for(var in c('sex', 'new_stage', 'smoking')) {
  if(is.factor(train_clinical_for_model[[var]])) {
    # 使用训练集的因子水平
    test_clinical_for_mixed[[var]] <- factor(test_clinical_for_mixed[[var]], 
                                             levels = levels(train_clinical_for_model[[var]]))
  }
}

# 构建生存对象（已经在前面定义过test_surv_obj）
# 但为了清晰，再次定义
mixed_surv_obj <- Surv(time = test_surv_time, event = test_surv_status)

# 拟合仅临床变量的Cox模型（在验证集上）
mixed_clinical_formula <- as.formula(paste("mixed_surv_obj ~", 
                                           paste(clinical_vars, collapse = " + ")))
mixed_clinical_model <- coxph(mixed_clinical_formula, data = test_clinical_for_mixed)

# 10.5.4 提取临床部分系数并计算临床部分风险评分
clinical_coef_mixed <- coef(mixed_clinical_model)
test_clinical_part <- predict(mixed_clinical_model, type = "lp")

# 10.5.5 计算混合模型总风险评分 = 脂质部分（固定系数）+ 临床部分（重新拟合）
test_mixed_risk_score <- as.numeric(test_lipid_part) + as.numeric(test_clinical_part)

# 10.5.6 计算混合模型AUC
mixed_roc_1year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time, 
                           delta = test_surv_status,
                           marker = test_mixed_risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 365,
                           ROC = TRUE)

mixed_roc_3year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time,
                           delta = test_surv_status,
                           marker = test_mixed_risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 1095,
                           ROC = TRUE)

mixed_roc_5year <- timeROC(T = test_surv_time,
                           delta = test_surv_status,
                           marker = test_mixed_risk_score,
                           cause = 1,
                           times = 1825,
                           ROC = TRUE)

cat("\n=== 混合模型AUC结果 ===\n")
cat("1年DFS AUC:", round(mixed_roc_1year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("3年DFS AUC:", round(mixed_roc_3year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
cat("5年DFS AUC:", round(mixed_roc_5year$AUC[2], 3), "\n")
# ==========
```


#PCA和PLS-DA分析
```{r}
# 加载必要包
library(ggplot2)
library(factoextra)
library(ropls)
# 假设你的数据框为data，列包括：SampleID, Relapse_Status（因子：Recurrence/No_Recurrence），以及后续的千余个脂质代谢物列（已归一化）
# 提取代谢物数据（数值矩阵）
data <- merged_data
data$dfs_status <- factor(data$dfs,
                          levels = c(0, 1),
                          labels = c("No_Recurrence", "Recurrence"))

rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID
metabolome_data <- data[, 2:2867] 
lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
lipid_data <- metabolome_data[,lipid_columns]

# 执行PCA（默认进行中心化，建议也进行标准化 scaling）
pca_result <- prcomp(lipid_data, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)

# 可视化：按复发状态着色
fviz_pca_ind(pca_result,
             geom.ind = "point", # 显示样本点
             col.ind = data$dfs_status, # 按组着色
             palette = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF"), # 自定义颜色
             addEllipses = TRUE, # 添加置信椭圆
             legend.title = " Dfs Status",
             title = "PCA - Lipidomics Profile") +
  theme_minimal()



# 执行PLS-DA（有监督分析）
plsda_result <- opls(x = lipid_data, 
                     y = data$dfs_status,
                     predI = 2,          # 指定潜变量数，通常从2开始
                     orthoI = 0,         # 正交成分数（0表示PLS-DA，>0则为OPLS-DA）
                     scaleC = "standard", # 标准化（与你PCA设置一致）
                     info.txtC = "none", # 减少运行输出
                     fig.pdfC = "none")   # 不自动输出PDF

# 查看模型摘要
plsda_result

# 设置图形参数
par(mfrow = c(2, 2)) # 2x2图形布局

# 1. 样本得分图（核心可视化）
plot(plsda_result, 
     typeVc = "x-score", 
     parAsColFcVn = data$dfs_status, # 按组着色
     parPaletteVc = c("#E7B800", "#2E9FDF")) # 颜色与PCA一致
title("PLS-DA Score Plot")

# 2. 模型评估图
plot(plsda_result, typeVc = "summary")
title("Model Summary (R2, Q2)")

# 3. 置换检验评估过拟合风险（重要！）
if (!is.null(plsda_result@modelDF$`R2Y(cum)`)) {
  plot(plsda_result, typeVc = "permutation")
  title("Permutation Test (200 permutations)")
}

# 4. 载荷图（查看对分离贡献大的代谢物）
plot(plsda_result, typeVc = "x-loading")
title("Loading Plot (Top Contributing Lipids)")



#  5.提取VIP值（变量重要性投影）
vip_values <- getVipVn(plsda_result)

# 按VIP值排序（VIP>1通常认为对分类有重要贡献）
important_lipids <- sort(vip_values[vip_values > 1], decreasing = TRUE)
head(important_lipids, 20) # 查看前20个重要脂质

# 保存重要代谢物列表
important_df <- data.frame(
  Lipid = names(important_lipids),
  VIP = as.numeric(important_lipids),
  Rank = 1:length(important_lipids)
)

# 6. library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel) # 避免标签重叠

# 提取得分
scores <- as.data.frame(plsda_result@scoreMN)
colnames(scores) <- c("t1", "t2")
scores$Group <- data$dfs_status
scores$Sample <- rownames(lipid_data)

# 计算95%置信椭圆（按组）
ellipse_data <- data.frame()
for(g in levels(scores$Group)) {
  group_data <- scores[scores$Group == g, c("t1", "t2")]
  if(nrow(group_data) > 2) {
    ellipse <- as.data.frame(ellipse::ellipse(
      cov(group_data), 
      centre = colMeans(group_data),
      level = 0.95
    ))
    ellipse$Group <- g
    ellipse_data <- rbind(ellipse_data, ellipse)
  }
}

# 绘制高质量得分图（使用ggplot2内置椭圆函数）
ggplot(scores, aes(x = t1, y = t2, color = Group)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95, type = "norm", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) + # 添加95%置信椭圆
  scale_color_manual(values = c("No_Recurrence" ="#E7B800" , 
                                "Recurrence" = "#2E9FDF")) +
  labs(x = paste("Component 1 (", 
                 round(plsda_result@modelDF$R2X[1]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""),
       y = paste("Component 2 (", 
                 round(plsda_result@modelDF$R2X[2]*100, 1), "%)", sep = ""), # 修正计算
       title = "PLS-DA Score Plot: Lipidomics and Recurrence Status",
       subtitle = paste("R2Y =", round(plsda_result@modelDF$`R2Y(cum)`, 3),
                        ", Q2 =", round(plsda_result@modelDF$`Q2(cum)`, 3))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", alpha = 0.5)
```

#聚类
```{r}
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)

# 获取表格lipid的列名
lipid <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid)
rownames(transposed_data_cleaned) <- transposed_data_cleaned$Patient_ID
# 获取表格中与lipid列名匹配的列
common_columns <- colnames(transposed_data_cleaned)[colnames(transposed_data_cleaned) %in% lipid_columns]

# 创建只包含匹配列的新表格
mydata <- transposed_data_cleaned[, common_columns]
View(mydata)

#标准化数据
mydata <- as.data.frame(scale(mydata))
#summary(mydata_scaled)


#kmeans聚类分析
#肘部法(elbow methods)选择最佳的K值
fviz_nbclust(mydata, kmeans, method = "wss")

set.seed(123)
km_model <- kmeans(mydata, centers = 3, nstart = 50)
km_model
#组别信息
km_model$cluster

#使用PCA先进行降维，再使用前两个主成分进行作图
fviz_cluster(km_model, data = mydata,
             palette = "jco",
             ggtheme = theme_minimal())
```
##层次聚类分析
```{r}
#层次聚类分析
#样本层次聚类
hclust_result <- hclust(dist(lipid_data))
# 绘制树状图
fviz_dend(hclust_result, main = "Hierarchical Clustering of Patients")
#图形美化
fviz_dend(hclust_result, k = 2,cex = 0.5,color_labels_by_k = TRUE, rect = TRUE)


#比较两组复发率差异
# 创建2×2列联表
data_matrix <- matrix(c(12, 14, 67, 119), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
                      dimnames = list(c("A组", "B组"), c("复发", "未复发")))

# Fisher确切概率检验
fisher_result <- fisher.test(data_matrix)
print(fisher_result)

# 卡方检验
expected <- chisq.test(data_matrix)$expected
expected
chi_result <- chisq.test(data_matrix,correct = FALSE)
print(chi_result)

# 带Yates连续性校正的卡方检验
chi_yates <- chisq.test(data_matrix, correct = TRUE)
print(chi_yates)

```

```{r}
#添加样本列名
final_data <- cbind(
  Patient_ID = transposed_data_cleaned[, 1],
  mydata,
  cluster = km_model$cluster
)
View(final_data)

#与生存数据结合
#合并代谢和生存数据
metabolome_survival <- fread("metabolome_survival.csv")
Clustered_data <- merge(x = final_data,      
                     y = metabolome_survival, 
                     by.x = "Patient_ID",             
                     by.y = "id",                     
                     all.x = TRUE)                     
View(Clustered_data)

Clustered_data$cluster2 <- ifelse(Clustered_data$cluster == 2, 2, 1)
Clustered_data$cluster2 <- factor(Clustered_data$cluster2)
Clustered_data$sex <- factor(Clustered_data$sex)
Clustered_data$stage <- factor(Clustered_data$stage)
Clustered_data$smoking <- factor(Clustered_data$smoking)
Clustered_data$alcohol <- factor(Clustered_data$alcohol)
Clustered_data$neo_adjuvant_therapy <- factor(Clustered_data$neo_adjuvant_therapy)
Clustered_data$perineural_invasion <- factor(Clustered_data$perineural_invasion)
Clustered_data$TC <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$TC)
Clustered_data$TG <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$TG)
Clustered_data$HDL <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$HDL)
Clustered_data$LDL <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$LDL)
Clustered_data$non_HDL <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$non_HDL)
Clustered_data$TG1 <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$TG1)
Clustered_data$HDL1 <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$HDL1)
Clustered_data$LDL1 <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$LDL1)
Clustered_data$new_stage <- as.numeric(Clustered_data$new_stage)
Clustered_data$stage_34vs12 <- factor(Clustered_data$stage_34vs12)
Clustered_data$Dyslipidemia <- factor(Clustered_data$Dyslipidemia)
Clustered_data$bmi2 <- factor(Clustered_data$bmi2)
Clustered_data$bmi3 <- factor(Clustered_data$bmi3)
Clustered_data$TG2 <- factor(Clustered_data$TG2)
Clustered_data$TC2 <- factor(Clustered_data$TC2)
Clustered_data$HDL2 <- factor(Clustered_data$HDL2)
Clustered_data$LDL2 <- factor(Clustered_data$LDL2)
Clustered_data$non_HDL2 <- factor(Clustered_data$non_HDL2)
Clustered_data$cluster <- factor(Clustered_data$cluster)
Clustered_data$cluster2 <- factor(Clustered_data$cluster2)
summary(Clustered_data)
fwrite(Clustered_data,file = "Clustered_data.csv",row.names = FALSE)

###生存分析
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(forestplot)

# Kaplan-Meier 生存曲线比较
#
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = Clustered_data)
ggsurvplot(km_fit, 
           data = Clustered_data,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = FALSE,
           risk.table = TRUE,
           legend.title = "cluster",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival",
           xlab = "Time (days)")


#单因素与多因素Cox回归
cox_uni <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = Clustered_data)
summary(cox_uni)
cox_multi <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi, data = Clustered_data)
summary(cox_multi)
#森林图可视化多因素结果
ggforest(cox_multi, data = Clustered_data, main = "Hazard Ratio of Factors")


#单因素与多因素逻辑回归
library(broom)
#单因素
logit_uni <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster, data = Clustered_data,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(logit_uni)
logit_uni_OR <- tidy(logit_uni, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
logit_uni_OR
#多因素
logit_multi <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data =Clustered_data,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(logit_multi)
logit_multi_OR <- tidy(logit_multi, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
logit_multi_OR
```

##kmeans聚类分析
```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)

# 1. 数据准备与分割,包含临床数据和脂质代谢物数据
data <- merged_data
rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID

# 提取代谢物数据，并且只包含lipid数据
which(colnames(data) == "X2866")
metabolome_data <- data[, 2:2867]
#提取脂质代谢物的列
lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
lipid_data <- metabolome_data[,lipid_columns]

#标准化法脂质数据
lipid_data <- as.data.frame(scale(lipid_data))
summary(lipid_data)

# 临床信息
clinical_data <- data[, 2868:2924]

#kmeans聚类分析
set.seed(123)
#肘部法(elbow methods)选择最佳的K值
fviz_nbclust(lipid_data, kmeans, method = "wss")

# 假设选择k=3作为最佳聚类数
k_optimal <- 3
km_model <- kmeans(lipid_data, centers = k_optimal, nstart = 50)
km_model
```
