```{r}
#组别信息
km_model$cluster

#使用PCA先进行降维，再使用前两个主成分进行作图
fviz_cluster(km_model, data = lipid_data,
             palette = "jco",
             ggtheme = theme_minimal())
#或者改变参数，不显示文本标签
fviz_cluster(km_model, data = lipid_data,
             palette = "jco",
             ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
             
             # 可选参数
             ellipse = TRUE,          # 使用椭圆代替凸包
             ellipse.type = "convex",   # 椭圆类型（"norm", "euclid", "t", "convex"）
             ellipse.level = 0.95,    # 椭圆置信水平
             star.plot = FALSE,        # 显示连接中心点的星状图
             repel = TRUE,            # 避免标签重叠
             labelsize = 10,          # 标签大小
             main = "K-means Clustering Visualization",  # 标题
             #xlab = "PC1", ylab = "PC2",  # 坐标轴标签
             show.clust.cent = TRUE,  # 显示聚类中心
             geom = c("point"),  # 显示点和文本标签
             pointsize = 2)            # 点大小



clinical_data$cluster <- as.factor(km_model$cluster)
#clinical_data$cluster <- factor(clinical_data$cluster, levels = c("2", "1", "3"))
clinical_data$cluster2 <- ifelse(clinical_data$cluster == 2, 2, 1)
clinical_data$cluster2 <- factor(clinical_data$cluster2)
summary(clinical_data$cluster)
summary(clinical_data$cluster2)


###生存分析
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(forestplot)

# Kaplan-Meier 生存曲线比较
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = clinical_data)
ggsurvplot(km_fit, 
           data = clinical_data,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = FALSE,
           risk.table = TRUE,
           legend.title = "cluster",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival",
           xlab = "Time (days)")


#单因素与多因素Cox回归
cox_uni <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = clinical_data)
summary(cox_uni)
cox_multi <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi, data = clinical_data)
summary(cox_multi)
#森林图可视化多因素结果
ggforest(cox_multi, data = clinical_data, main = "Hazard Ratio of Factors")


#单因素与多因素逻辑回归
library(broom)
#单因素
logit_uni <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster, data = clinical_data,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(logit_uni)
logit_uni_OR <- tidy(logit_uni, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
logit_uni_OR
#多因素
logit_multi <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data =clinical_data,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(logit_multi)
logit_multi_OR <- tidy(logit_multi, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
logit_multi_OR



#使用ANOVA筛选不同聚类间差异代谢物
diff_metabolites <- sapply(colnames(lipid_data), function(metabolite) {
  anova_result <- aov(lipid_data[[metabolite]] ~ clinical_data$cluster)
  summary(anova_result)[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1]
})

#转换为数据框并添加多重检验校正
diff_results <- data.frame(
  metabolite = names(diff_metabolites),
  p_value = diff_metabolites,
  p_adjust = p.adjust(diff_metabolites, method = "fdr")  # FDR校正
)

# 选择FDR < 0.05的显著差异代谢物
diff_metabolites_fdr <- p.adjust(diff_metabolites, method = "fdr")
sig_metabolites <- names(diff_metabolites_fdr[diff_metabolites_fdr < 0.05])

# （方法一）3.1差异代谢物热图
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)
# 选择前50个最显著的差异代谢物（选择的是fdr校正后的差异代谢物）
top_sig_metabolites <- diff_results %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p_adjust) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  pull(metabolite)

# 提取训练集数据
heatmap_data <- lipid_data[, top_sig_metabolites]

# 添加聚类信息作为行注释
annotation_row <- data.frame(Cluster = clinical_data$cluster)
rownames(annotation_row) <- rownames(lipid_data)

# 设置颜色
colors_cluster <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd",
                    "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf")[1:length(unique(clinical_data$cluster))]
names(colors_cluster) <- levels(clinical_data$cluster)
ann_colors <- list(Cluster = colors_cluster)

# 绘制热图
pheatmap(t(heatmap_data),  # 转置不再进行标准化
         main = "Differential Metabolites Heatmap",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,      # 代谢物聚类
         cluster_cols = TRUE,      # 样本聚类
         show_colnames = FALSE,    # 不显示样本名（太多）
         show_rownames = TRUE,     # 显示代谢物名
         annotation_col = annotation_row,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         fontsize_row = 8,
         cutree_rows = k_optimal,          # 按3类切割代谢物树状图
         cutree_cols = k_optimal)          # 按3类切割样本树状图



# （方法二）3.1 差异代谢物热图（按聚类排序）
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)

# 选择前50个最显著的差异代谢物
top_sig_metabolites <- diff_results %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p_adjust) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  pull(metabolite)

# 提取数据
heatmap_data <- lipid_data[, top_sig_metabolites]

# 获取聚类信息并按聚类排序
cluster_order <- order(clinical_data$cluster)
heatmap_data_sorted <- heatmap_data[cluster_order, ]
clinical_data_sorted <- clinical_data[cluster_order, ]

# 添加聚类信息作为行注释
annotation_row <- data.frame(Cluster = clinical_data_sorted$cluster)
rownames(annotation_row) <- rownames(heatmap_data_sorted)

# 设置颜色
colors_cluster <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd",
                    "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf")[1:length(unique(clinical_data_sorted$cluster))]
names(colors_cluster) <- levels(clinical_data_sorted$cluster)
ann_colors <- list(Cluster = colors_cluster)

# 绘制热图（样本按聚类排序，不对列进行聚类）
pheatmap(t(heatmap_data_sorted),
         main = "Differential Metabolites Heatmap",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,      # 代谢物聚类
         cluster_cols = FALSE,     # 不进行样本聚类，保持按聚类排序的顺序
         show_colnames = FALSE,    # 不显示样本名
         show_rownames = TRUE,     # 显示代谢物名
         annotation_col = annotation_row,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         fontsize_row = 8,
         cutree_rows = k_optimal,  # 按3类切割代谢物树状图
         gaps_col =cumsum(table(clinical_data_sorted$cluster))[-length(table(clinical_data_sorted$cluster))],   #在聚类之间添加分隔线
         breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101))
```

## 共识聚类
```{r}
# 共识聚类与确定分型 
library(ConsensusClusterPlus)
library(Rtsne)
library(cluster)

# 1. 共识聚类 (确定最佳聚类数K)
# 将数据转为矩阵，行是样本，列是脂质
mat_data <- as.matrix(mydata)

title <- "./ConsensusCluster_Results" # 输出目录

cc_res <- ConsensusClusterPlus(mat_data,
                               maxK = 8,      # 测试的最大聚类数
                               reps = 1000,   # 重抽样次数
                               pItem = 0.8,   # 每次抽取80%样本
                               pFeature = 0.8, # 每次抽取80%特征
                               clusterAlg = "pam", 
                               distance = "pearson",
                               seed = 2024,
                               title = title,
                               plot = "png")

# 2. 评估并选择K (通常选择共识累积分布函数图拐点或共识系数高的K)
# 查看K=2,3,4时的共识矩阵热图
# 根据结果，假设我们选择 K=3
optimal_k <- 3
sample_clusters <- cc_res[[optimal_k]]$consensusClass

# 将聚类标签加入原始数据框
df$lipid_cluster <- factor(sample_clusters)

# 3. 使用t-SNE可视化聚类结果
set.seed(123)
tsne_res <- Rtsne(mat_data, perplexity = 15, dims = 2)
tsne_df <- data.frame(TSNE1 = tsne_res$Y[,1], 
                      TSNE2 = tsne_res$Y[,2], 
                      Cluster = df$lipid_cluster)

ggplot(tsne_df, aes(x = TSNE1, y = TSNE2, color = Cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "t-SNE Visualization of Lipid Metabolism Subtypes")

### R代码示例：生存分析 ###
library(survival)
library(survminer)
library(forestplot)

# 1. Kaplan-Meier 生存曲线比较
km_fit <- survfit(Surv(time, status) ~ lipid_cluster, data = df)

ggsurvplot(km_fit, 
           data = df,
           pval = TRUE, 
           conf.int = FALSE,
           risk.table = TRUE,
           legend.title = "Lipid Cluster",
           title = "Kaplan-Meier Survival by Lipid Metabolism Subtype",
           xlab = "Time (Months)")

# 2. 单因素与多因素Cox回归
# 单因素: 仅评估脂质亚型
cox_uni <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ lipid_cluster, data = df)
summary(cox_uni)

# 多因素: 校正其他变量 (例如年龄、性别、分期)
# 假设你的数据框中还有 age, gender, stage 列
cox_multi <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ lipid_cluster + age + gender + stage, 
                   data = df)
summary(cox_multi)

# 3. 森林图可视化多因素结果 (展示风险比HR)
ggforest(cox_multi, data = df, 
         main = "Hazard Ratio of Factors Influencing Survival")








```

##kmeans训练集和验证集
```{r}
# 加载必要的包
library(tidyverse)
library(survival)
library(survminer)
#方法一
# 设置随机种子确保结果可重复
#set.seed(123)  # 任意数字，比如123，保证每次运行结果相同
# 1. 数据准备
#data <- merged_data
#rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID
# 2. 随机打乱数据顺序
#random_indices <- sample(1:nrow(data))  # 生成随机顺序
#data_random <- data[random_indices, ]
# 3. 计算训练集样本数
#train_ratio <- 0.5
#n_total <- nrow(data_random)
#n_train <- round(n_total * train_ratio)
# 4. 随机分割
#train_data <- data_random[1:n_train, ]
#test_data <- data_random[(n_train+1):n_total, ]


#方法二
# 1. 数据准备与分割,包含临床数据和脂质代谢物数据
data <- merged_data
rownames(data) <- data$Patient_ID
# 按诊断时间排序
data_sorted <- data[order(data$surgery_date), ]
# 设置分割比例
train_ratio <- 0.5  # 训练集占50%
# 计算训练集样本数
n_total <- nrow(data_sorted)
n_train <- round(n_total * train_ratio)
# 按时间顺序分割
train_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]        # 前50%为训练集
test_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] # 后50%为验证集

#训练集和验证集反向验证
#test_data <- data_sorted[1:n_train, ]      
#train_data <- data_sorted[(n_train+1):n_total, ] 

# 提取代谢物数据，并且只包含lipid数据
which(colnames(train_data) == "X2866")
train_metabolome <- train_data[, 2:2867]
test_metabolome <- test_data[, 2:2867]

lipid_names <- fread("lipid.csv")
lipid_columns <- colnames(lipid_names)
summary(lipid_columns)
train_lipids <- train_metabolome[,lipid_columns]
test_lipids<- test_metabolome[,lipid_columns]

#标准化法脂质数据
train_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(train_lipids))
test_lipids <- as.data.frame(scale(test_lipids))

# 临床信息
train_clinical <- train_data[, 2868:2924]
test_clinical <- test_data[, 2868:2924]

# 2. 训练集聚类分析（k-means）
set.seed(123)
# 确定最佳k值（肘部法则）
wss <- sapply(1:10, function(k) {
  kmeans(train_lipids, centers = k, nstart = 50)$tot.withinss
})

# 绘制肘部图
plot(1:10, wss, type = "b", xlab = "Number of clusters", ylab = "Within-cluster sum of squares", col = "#1f77b4")

# 假设选择k=3作为最佳聚类数
k_optimal <- 3
kmeans_train <- kmeans(train_lipids, centers = k_optimal, nstart = 50)
train_clinical$cluster <- as.factor(kmeans_train$cluster)
#train_clinical$cluster <- factor(train_clinical$cluster, levels = c("2", "1", "3"))
summary(train_clinical$cluster)

# 3. 差异代谢物筛选
# 使用ANOVA筛选不同聚类间差异代谢物
diff_metabolites <- sapply(colnames(train_lipids), function(metabolite) {
  anova_result <- aov(train_lipids[[metabolite]] ~ train_clinical$cluster)
  summary(anova_result)[[1]][["Pr(>F)"]][1]
})

#转换为数据框并添加多重检验校正
diff_results <- data.frame(
  metabolite = names(diff_metabolites),
  p_value = diff_metabolites,
  p_adjust = p.adjust(diff_metabolites, method = "fdr")  # FDR校正
)
#fwrite(diff_results,file = "diff_results.csv",row.names = FALSE)

# 选择FDR < 0.05的显著差异代谢物
diff_metabolites_fdr <- p.adjust(diff_metabolites, method = "fdr")
sig_metabolites <- names(diff_metabolites_fdr[diff_metabolites_fdr < 0.05])

#(方法一) 3.1差异代谢物热图
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)
# 选择前50个最显著的差异代谢物（选择的是fdr校正后的差异代谢物）
top_sig_metabolites <- diff_results %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p_adjust) %>%
  head(100) %>%
  pull(metabolite)

# 提取训练集数据
heatmap_data <- train_lipids[, top_sig_metabolites]

# 添加聚类信息作为行注释
annotation_row <- data.frame(Cluster = train_clinical$cluster)
rownames(annotation_row) <- rownames(train_lipids)

# 设置颜色
colors_cluster <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd", 
                    "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf")[1:length(unique(train_clinical$cluster))]
names(colors_cluster) <- levels(train_clinical$cluster)
ann_colors <- list(Cluster = colors_cluster)

# 绘制热图
pheatmap(t(heatmap_data),  # 转置,不再进行标准化
         main = "Differential Metabolites Heatmap",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,      # 代谢物聚类
         cluster_cols = TRUE,      # 样本聚类
         show_colnames = FALSE,    # 不显示样本名（太多）
         show_rownames = TRUE,     # 显示代谢物名
         annotation_col = annotation_row,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         fontsize_row = 8,
         cutree_rows = k_optimal,          # 按3类切割代谢物树状图
         cutree_cols = k_optimal,            # 按3类切割样本树状图
         breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101)) 

#（方法二） 3.1 差异代谢物热图（按聚类排序）
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)

# 选择前50个最显著的差异代谢物
top_sig_metabolites <- diff_results %>%
  filter(p_adjust < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(p_adjust) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  pull(metabolite)

# 提取训练集数据
heatmap_data <- train_lipids[, top_sig_metabolites]

#给代谢物替换真实名称
substitute_list <- fread("代谢物名字替代名单.csv")
# 获取当前列名
current_names <- names(heatmap_data)
# 使用 match 找到每个当前列名在 surrogate 中的位置
# 注意：如果列名不在 surrogate 中，match 会返回 NA
idx <- match(current_names, substitute_list$surrogate)
# 生成新列名：如果匹配到则用对应的 name，否则保留原列名
new_names <- ifelse(!is.na(idx), 
                    substitute_list$name[idx], 
                    current_names)

# 替换列名
names(heatmap_data) <- new_names


# 获取聚类信息并按聚类排序
cluster_order <- order(train_clinical$cluster)
heatmap_data_sorted <- heatmap_data[cluster_order, ]
train_clinical_sorted <- train_clinical[cluster_order, ]

# 添加聚类信息作为行注释
annotation_row <- data.frame(Cluster = train_clinical_sorted$cluster)
rownames(annotation_row) <- rownames(heatmap_data_sorted)

# 设置颜色
colors_cluster <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd",
                    "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf")[1:length(unique(train_clinical_sorted$cluster))]
names(colors_cluster) <- levels(train_clinical_sorted$cluster)
ann_colors <- list(Cluster = colors_cluster)

# 绘制热图（样本按聚类排序，不对列进行聚类）
pheatmap(t(heatmap_data_sorted),
         main = "Differential Metabolites Heatmap",
         cluster_rows = TRUE,      # 代谢物聚类
         cluster_cols = FALSE,     # 不进行样本聚类，保持按聚类排序的顺序
         show_colnames = FALSE,    # 不显示样本名
         show_rownames = TRUE,     # 不显示代谢物名
         annotation_col = annotation_row,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         fontsize_row = 8,
         cutree_rows = k_optimal,  # 按3类切割代谢物树状图
         gaps_col = cumsum(table(train_clinical_sorted$cluster))[-length(table(train_clinical_sorted$cluster))],  # 在聚类之间添加分隔线
         breaks = seq(-2, 2, length.out = 101))

# 4. 训练集生存分析
# 4.1 绘制Kaplan-Meier曲线
km_train <- survfit(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = train_clinical)

# 在生存分析部分定义颜色调色板
library(survminer)
library(gridExtra)
library(RColorBrewer)
train_palette <- c("#6baed6", "#fd8d3c", "#74c476")  # 较浅的蓝色、橙色、绿色
test_palette <- c("#2171b5", "#d94701", "#238b45")  # 较深的蓝色、橙色、绿色
train_plot <- ggsurvplot(km_train, data = train_clinical,
           pval = TRUE, pval.method = TRUE,
           pval.size = 8,                # 增大p值文本
           risk.table = TRUE,
           risk.table.fontsize = 6,    
           palette = train_palette, # 使用较浅的颜色
           title = "Training Set Survival Analysis",
           font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),   # 标题大小22，粗体
           font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),       # X轴标签大小20
           font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),       # Y轴标签大小20
           font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),# 刻度标签大小18
           font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     # 图例曲线标签（大小16）
           xlab = "Time (days)",
           tables.theme = theme(
              axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),   # X轴刻度数字
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),   # Y轴刻度数字（即风险表的行标签）
              axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),  # X轴标题（通常为“Time”）
              axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),  # Y轴标题（通常为“Number at risk”）
              plot.title = element_text(size = 20,face = "bold")     # 风险表标题
              )
           )
# 将标题居中对齐
train_plot$plot <- train_plot$plot + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

# 4.2 单因素Cox分析（仅cluster）
uni_cox_train <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = train_clinical)
summary(uni_cox_train)

# 4.3 多因素Cox分析（调整其他临床变量）
multi_cox_train <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data = train_clinical)
summary(multi_cox_train)

# 提取风险比和置信区间
train_cox_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = rownames(summary(multi_cox_train)$coefficients),
  HR = exp(coef(multi_cox_train)),
  CI_lower = exp(confint(multi_cox_train))[, 1],
  CI_upper = exp(confint(multi_cox_train))[, 2],
  P_value = summary(multi_cox_train)$coefficients[, 5]
)
print("训练集多因素Cox分析结果：")
print(train_cox_results)

# 4.4 单因素逻辑回归
library(broom)
#单因素
uni_logit_train <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster, data = train_clinical,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(uni_logit_train)
uni_logit_train_OR <- tidy(uni_logit_train, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
uni_logit_train_OR
# 4.5 多因素逻辑回归 
multi_logit_train <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data =train_clinical,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(multi_logit_train)
multi_logit_train_OR <- tidy(multi_logit_train, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
multi_logit_train_OR

# 5. 验证集分析
# 5.1 使用训练集的聚类中心对验证集进行聚类
# 使用所有代谢物进行聚类
train_centers <- kmeans_train$centers# 使用所有代谢物的聚类中心

# 计算验证集样本到训练集聚类中心的距离
dist_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(test_lipids), ncol = nrow(train_centers))
for(i in 1:nrow(test_lipids)) {
  for(j in 1:nrow(train_centers)) {
    dist_matrix[i, j] <- sqrt(sum((test_lipids[i, ] - train_centers[j, ])^2))
  }
}

# 将验证集样本分配到最近的聚类中心
test_clinical$cluster <- as.factor(apply(dist_matrix, 1, which.min))
#test_clinical$cluster <- factor(test_clinical$cluster, levels = c("2", "1", "3"))
summary(test_clinical$cluster)

# 5.2 验证集生存分析
# 5.2.1 绘制Kaplan-Meier曲线
km_test <- survfit(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = test_clinical)
test_plot <- ggsurvplot(km_test, data = test_clinical,
           pval = TRUE, pval.method = TRUE,
           pval.size = 8,
           risk.table = TRUE,
           risk.table.fontsize = 6,    
           palette = test_palette,  # 使用较深的颜色
           title = "Validation Set Survival Analysis",
           font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),
           font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),
           font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),
           font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),
           font.legend = c(16, "plain"),
           xlab = "Time (days)",
           tables.theme = theme(
              axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),   # X轴刻度数字
              axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),   # Y轴刻度数字（即风险表的行标签）
              axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),  # X轴标题（通常为“Time”）
              axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),  # Y轴标题（通常为“Number at risk”）
              plot.title = element_text(size = 20,face = "bold")     # 风险表标题
              )
           )
# 将标题居中对齐
test_plot$plot <- test_plot$plot + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) #hjust = 0.5 表示水平居中（取值范围 0 左对齐，0.5 居中，1 右对齐）


# 使用arrange_ggsurvplots合并图片
cluster_combined_plots <- arrange_ggsurvplots(
  list(train_plot, test_plot),
  ncol = 2, nrow = 1,  # 一行两列，横向并排
  print = FALSE
)

# 保存到PDF
pdf("combined_survival_plots_horizontal.pdf", width = 20, height = 10)
print(cluster_combined_plots)
dev.off()

# 5.2.2 单因素Cox分析（仅cluster）
uni_cox_test <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster, data = test_clinical)
summary(uni_cox_test)

# 5.2.3 多因素Cox分析（调整其他临床变量）
multi_cox_test <- coxph(Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data = test_clinical)
summary(multi_cox_test)

# 提取风险比和置信区间
test_cox_results <- data.frame(
  Variable = rownames(summary(multi_cox_test)$coefficients),
  HR = exp(coef(multi_cox_test)),
  CI_lower = exp(confint(multi_cox_test))[, 1],
  CI_upper = exp(confint(multi_cox_test))[, 2],
  P_value = summary(multi_cox_test)$coefficients[, 5]
)
print("验证集多因素Cox分析结果：")
print(test_cox_results)

# 5.3 单因素逻辑回归
library(broom)
uni_logit_test <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster, data = test_clinical,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(uni_logit_test)
uni_logit_test_OR <- tidy(uni_logit_test, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
uni_logit_test_OR
# 5.4 多因素逻辑回归 
multi_logit_test <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ cluster+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi,data =test_clinical,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(multi_logit_test)
multi_logit_test_OR <- tidy(multi_logit_test, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
multi_logit_test_OR

# 6. 结果汇总
# 创建结果汇总表
results_summary <- data.frame(
  数据集 = c("训练集", "验证集"),
  样本数 = c(nrow(train_clinical), nrow(test_clinical)),
  聚类数 = c(k_optimal, k_optimal),
  显著代谢物数 = c(length(sig_metabolites), length(sig_metabolites)),
  单因素HR_cluster2 = c(
    exp(coef(uni_cox_train))["cluster2"],
    exp(coef(uni_cox_test))["cluster2"]
  ),
  单因素HR_cluster3 = c(
    exp(coef(uni_cox_train))["cluster3"],
    exp(coef(uni_cox_test))["cluster3"]
  ),
  单因素P值 = c(
    summary(uni_cox_train)$coefficients["cluster2", 5],
    summary(uni_cox_test)$coefficients["cluster2", 5]
  ),
  多因素P值_cluster = c(
    summary(multi_cox_train)$coefficients["cluster2", 5],
    summary(multi_cox_test)$coefficients["cluster2", 5]
  )
)

print(results_summary)

# 7. 可视化Cox分析结果
# 7.1 绘制森林图（训练集）
ggforest(multi_cox_train, data = train_clinical,
         main = "Hazard Ratio of Training Set (Multivariate Cox)")

# 7.2 绘制森林图（验证集）
ggforest(multi_cox_test, data = test_clinical,
         main = "Hazard Ratio of Validation Set (Multivariate Cox)")

# 8. 可视化聚类结果（可选）
# 训练集PCA可视化
pca_train <- prcomp(train_lipids, scale. = FALSE)
pca_train_df <- as.data.frame(pca_train$x[, 1:2])
pca_train_df$cluster <- train_clinical$cluster

p1 <- ggplot(pca_train_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95) +
  labs(title = "Training Set Clustering (PCA)", 
       subtitle = paste("Using",ncol(train_lipids), "metabolites")) +
  theme_minimal()

# 验证集PCA可视化
pca_test <- prcomp(test_lipids, scale. = FALSE)
pca_test_df <- as.data.frame(pca_test$x[, 1:2])
pca_test_df$cluster <- test_clinical$cluster

p2 <- ggplot(pca_test_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95) +
  labs(title = "Validation Set Clustering (PCA)", 
       subtitle = paste("Using",ncol(test_lipids), "metabolites")) +
  theme_minimal()

# 并排显示
library(gridExtra)
grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)

```
#图形摘要聚类生存曲线
```{r}
# 训练集曲线
train_plot1 <- ggsurvplot(km_train, data = train_clinical,
                          pval = TRUE, pval.method = TRUE,
                          pval.size = 8,                # 增大p值文本
                          palette = train_palette,
                          title = "Training Set Survival Analysis",
                          font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),   # 标题大小20，粗体
                          font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),       # X轴标签大小18
                          font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),       # Y轴标签大小18
                          font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),# 刻度标签大小18
                          font.legend = c(16, "plain"),     # 图例曲线标签（大小14）
                          xlab = "Time (days)")
# 验证集曲线
test_plot1 <- ggsurvplot(km_test, data = test_clinical,
                         pval = TRUE, pval.method = TRUE,
                         pval.size = 8,
                         palette = test_palette,
                         title = "Validation Set Survival Analysis",
                         font.title = c(22, "bold", "black"),
                         font.x = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                         font.y = c(20, "plain", "black"),
                         font.tickslab = c(18, "plain", "black"),
                         font.legend = c(16, "plain"),
                         xlab = "Time (days)")


train_plot1$plot <- train_plot1$plot + theme(aspect.ratio = 1,plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
test_plot1$plot  <- test_plot1$plot  + theme(aspect.ratio = 1,plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
library(cowplot)

combined_plots <- plot_grid(
  train_plot1$plot,
  test_plot1$plot,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1),
  labels = c("A", "B")          # 可选，添加子图标签
)
pdf("combined_survival_plots_square.pdf", width = 20, height = 10)
print(combined_plots)
dev.off()

```


#相关性检验
```{r}
# 1. 读取数据
data <- fread("merged_data.csv")
# 2. 转换为data.frame
data_df <- as.data.frame(data)
# 提取X1到X2866的数值变量（假设这些是数值型变量）
# 注意：根据实际情况调整列范围
x_vars <- data_df[, grep("^X[0-9]+$", names(data_df))]

# 3. 计算相关系数矩阵
cor_matrix <- cor(x_vars, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# 4. 查看矩阵维度
dim(cor_matrix)

# 5. 查看前几行前几列
cor_matrix[1:10, 1:10]
# 由于相关系数矩阵是对称的，上述方法会包含重复的对（如X1-X2和X2-X1）
# 以下代码只保留上三角部分，避免重复，创建上三角索引
upper_tri <- upper.tri(cor_matrix)
# 6. 查看高度相关（>0.8或<-0.8）的变量对
high_cor <- which(abs(cor_matrix) > 0.8 & abs(cor_matrix) < 1 & upper_tri, arr.ind = TRUE)
high_cor_pairs <- data.frame(
  Var1 = rownames(cor_matrix)[high_cor[, 1]],
  Var2 = colnames(cor_matrix)[high_cor[, 2]],
  Correlation = cor_matrix[high_cor]
)
unique_high_cor_vars <- unique(c(high_cor_pairs$Var1, high_cor_pairs$Var2))
fwrite(high_cor_pairs, "all_high_correlation_pairs_unsorted.csv", row.names = FALSE)
fwrite(data.frame(Variable = unique_high_cor_vars), 
          "unique_high_correlation_variables_unsorted.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)
```
#选择p值较小的变量
```{r include=FALSE}
# 加载必要包
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

# 读取工作簿2和工作簿3或4，工作簿3是原始数据脂质相关变量，4是标准化后的脂质相关变量
df2 <- read_excel("工作簿2.xlsx")
df3 <- read_excel("工作簿4.xlsx")  # 假设包含Var1和Var2两列

# 为df3中的每对变量选择p值更小的那个
selected_vars <- df3 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    p1 = df2$p_value[df2$surrogate == Var1],
    p2 = df2$p_value[df2$surrogate == Var2],
    selected_var = ifelse(p1 <= p2, Var1, Var2),
    selected_p = min(p1, p2, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 获取最终选择的唯一变量
final_vars <- selected_vars %>%
  distinct(selected_var) %>%
  left_join(df2, by = c("selected_var" = "surrogate")) 

# 输出结果
write.csv(selected_vars, "selected_variables.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(final_vars, "final_selected_variables.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#设置5：5的训练集和验证集
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

df <- fread("merged_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df$sex <- factor(df$sex)
df$stage <- factor(df$stage)
df$smoking <- factor(df$smoking)
df$alcohol <- factor(df$alcohol)
df$neo_adjuvant_therapy <- factor(df$neo_adjuvant_therapy)
df$perineural_invasion <- factor(df$perineural_invasion)
df$TC <- as.numeric(df$TC)
df$TG <- as.numeric(df$TG)
df$HDL <- as.numeric(df$HDL)
df$LDL <- as.numeric(df$LDL)
df$non_HDL <- as.numeric(df$non_HDL)
df$TG1 <- as.numeric(df$TG1)
df$HDL1 <- as.numeric(df$HDL1)
df$LDL1 <- as.numeric(df$LDL1)
df$new_stage <- as.numeric(df$new_stage)
df$stage_34vs12 <- factor(df$stage_34vs12)
df$Dyslipidemia <- factor(df$Dyslipidemia)
df$bmi2 <- factor(df$bmi2)
df$bmi3 <- factor(df$bmi3)
df$TG2 <- factor(df$TG2)
df$TC2 <- factor(df$TC2)
df$HDL2 <- factor(df$HDL2)
df$LDL2 <- factor(df$LDL2)
df$non_HDL2 <- factor(df$non_HDL2)

df$surgery_date <- as.Date(df$surgery_date)

# 3. 按手术日期排序
df <- df[order(df$surgery_date), ]

# 4. 计算分割点（6:4比例）
total_rows <- nrow(df)
train_size <- floor(0.5 * total_rows)

# 5. 分割数据集
train_data <- df[1:train_size, ]
test_data <- df[(train_size + 1):total_rows, ]

#merged_data <- train_data
#merged_data <- test_data
```

#单因素cox分析
```{r}
#单变量cox分析
library(survival)
which(colnames(merged_data) == "X2866")
metabolite_cols <- 2:2867
# 创建空列表存储结果
cox_results <- list()

# 获取总样本数
total_samples <- nrow(merged_data)

# 循环进行单变量Cox回归分析
for (i in metabolite_cols) {
  # 获取代谢物名称
  metabolite_name <- names(merged_data)[i]
  # 构建Cox模型公式
  formula <- as.formula(paste("Surv(dfs_time, dfs) ~", metabolite_name))
   # 使用tryCatch处理可能出现的错误
  tryCatch({
  # 拟合Cox模型
  cox_model <- coxph(formula, data = merged_data)
  # 提取模型摘要
  model_summary <- summary(cox_model)
  
   # 计算模型使用的样本信息
  n_total <- cox_model$n  # 模型中的总人数（无缺失值）
  n_event <- cox_model$nevent  # 事件数
  n_missing <- total_samples - n_total  # 缺失值数量
  
  # 提取HR值
  HR <- exp(model_summary$coefficients[1, 1])
  # 提取置信区间 -从conf.int中提取
  # 注意：conf.int包含4列：exp(coef)、exp(-coef)、lower .95、upper .95
  HR_lower <- model_summary$conf.int[1, 3]  # lower .95
  HR_upper <- model_summary$conf.int[1, 4]  # upper .95
  # 提取p值
  p_value <- model_summary$coefficients[1, 5]
  
  # 存储结果
    cox_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = n_total,
      n_event = n_event,
      n_missing = n_missing,
      HR = HR,
      HR_lower = HR_lower,
      HR_upper = HR_upper,
      p_value = p_value,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # 如果分析出错，存储NA值
    cox_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = NA,
      n_event = NA,
      n_missing = sum(is.na(merged_data[[metabolite_name]])),
      HR = NA,
      HR_lower = NA,
      HR_upper = NA,
      p_value = NA,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  })
}

# 将结果转换为数据框
result_df <- do.call(rbind, cox_results)
result_df <- as.data.frame(result_df)

# 添加代谢物名称列
result_df$Metabolite <- rownames(result_df)

# 计算FDR校正的p值（BH方法）
result_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(result_df$p_value, method = "BH")

# 重排列顺序，将代谢物名称放在第一列
result_df <- result_df[, c("Metabolite", "n_total", "n_event", "n_missing", 
                           "HR", "HR_lower", "HR_upper", "p_value", "p_adj")]

# 保存结果为CSV文件
fwrite(result_df, "univariate_cox_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#多因素cox分析
```{r}
#多因素cox分析
library(survival)

# 定义协变量
covariates <- c("sex", "age", "new_stage", "smoking", "bmi")

# 创建空列表存储结果
multivariate_results  <- list()

# 循环进行多因素Cox回归分析
for (i in 2:2867) {
  # 获取代谢物名称
  metabolite_name <- names(merged_data)[i]
  
  # 构建多因素Cox模型公式
  formula <- as.formula(paste("Surv(dfs_time,dfs) ~", metabolite_name, "+", 
                              paste(covariates, collapse = " + ")))
  
  # 使用tryCatch处理可能出现的错误
  tryCatch({
  # 拟合多因素Cox模型
  cox_model <- coxph(formula, data = merged_data)
    # 提取模型摘要
    model_summary <- summary(cox_model)
    
     # 计算模型使用的样本信息
  n_total <- cox_model$n  # 总人数
  n_event <- cox_model$nevent  # 事件数
  n_missing <- nrow(merged_data) - n_total  # 缺失值
  
  # 提取代谢物的统计量（在多因素模型中）
  # 注意：代谢物是第一个变量，协变量在后面
  coef_index <- 1  # 代谢物在模型中的系数索引
  
  # 提取代谢物的HR值
    HR <- exp(model_summary$coefficients[coef_index, 1])
    
    # 提取代谢物的置信区间
    HR_lower <- model_summary$conf.int[coef_index, 3]  # 95% CI下限
    HR_upper <- model_summary$conf.int[coef_index, 4]  # 95% CI上限
    
    # 提取代谢物的p值
    p_value <- model_summary$coefficients[coef_index, 5]
    
  # 存储结果
    multivariate_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = n_total,
      n_event = n_event,
      n_missing = n_missing,
      HR = HR,
      HR_lower = HR_lower,
      HR_upper = HR_upper,
      p_value = p_value,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    # 如果分析出错，存储NA值
    multivariate_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = NA,
      n_event = NA,
      n_missing = NA,
      HR = NA,
      HR_lower = NA,
      HR_upper = NA,
      p_value = NA,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
}


# 将结果转换为数据框
multivariate_df <- do.call(rbind, multivariate_results)
multivariate_df <- as.data.frame(multivariate_df)

# 添加代谢物名称列
multivariate_df$Metabolite <- rownames(multivariate_df)

# 计算FDR校正的p值（BH方法）
multivariate_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(multivariate_df$p_value, method = "BH")

# 重排列顺序，将代谢物名称放在第一列
multivariate_df <- multivariate_df[, c("Metabolite", "n_total", "n_event", "n_missing", 
                                         "HR", "HR_lower", "HR_upper", "p_value", "p_adj")]


# 保存结果为CSV文件
fwrite(multivariate_df, "multivariate_cox_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

#图形摘要森林图
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# 数据准备（同上）
data <- data.frame(
  Lipid = c("Cer(d18:1_18:0)", "Cer(42:6)", "PC(18:0_18:2(9Z,12Z))", 
            "PC 34:6", "PA 36:1", "LacCer(d18:1_16:0)", 
            "Hex1Cer(45:8)", "ST(34:1)", "SM(d41:2)"),
  HR_train = c(2.14, 1.66, 1.64, 1.78, 1.86, 1.58, 1.58, 1.75, 1.43),
  CI_lower_train = c(1.51, 1.16, 1.19, 1.21, 1.31, 1.17, 1.16, 1.21, 1.11),
  CI_upper_train = c(3.02, 2.36, 2.26, 2.63, 2.64, 2.15, 2.16, 2.54, 1.82),
  HR_val = c(1.74, 1.77, 1.79, 1.72, 1.95, 1.38, 1.39, 1.68, 1.54),
  CI_lower_val = c(1.40, 1.30, 1.33, 1.35, 1.43, 1.00, 1.02, 1.33, 1.10),
  CI_upper_val = c(2.16, 2.42, 2.42, 2.18, 2.66, 1.89, 1.90, 2.12, 2.14)
)

# 转换长格式
plot_data <- data.frame(
  Lipid = rep(data$Lipid, 2),
  HR = c(data$HR_train, data$HR_val),
  CI_lower = c(data$CI_lower_train, data$CI_lower_val),
  CI_upper = c(data$CI_upper_train, data$CI_upper_val),
  Set = rep(c("Training", "Validation"), each = nrow(data)),
  y_pos = rep(seq(nrow(data), 1), 2)
)

# 偏移位置避免重叠
plot_data$y_pos <- ifelse(plot_data$Set == "Training", 
                          plot_data$y_pos + 0.2, 
                          plot_data$y_pos - 0.2)

# 绘图
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = HR, y = y_pos, color = Set)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = CI_lower, xmax = CI_upper), 
                 height = 0.15, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Training" = "#2E5F8E", "Validation" = "#B22222")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(nrow(data), 1), 
                     labels = rev(data$Lipid)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 4), breaks = seq(0, 4, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.5, nrow(data) + 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "#7A8B99", fill = NA, linewidth = 1.5),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F5F9F8", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#F5F9F8", color = NA),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "#7A8B99", linewidth = 0.8),  # 官方X轴线
    axis.line.y = element_line(color = "#7A8B99", linewidth = 0.8),  # 官方Y轴线
    legend.position = "none"
  )
 
ggsave("forest_plot.pdf", p, width = 8, height = 10, device = cairo_pdf)
ggsave("forest_plot.svg", p, width = 8, height = 10)
print(p)
```

#单因素Logistic回归分析
```{r}
#单因素Logistic回归分析
metabolite_cols <- 2:2867
logistic_results <- list()
total_samples <- nrow(merged_data)

# 进行单变量逻辑回归分析
for (i in metabolite_cols) {
  metabolite_name <- names(merged_data)[i]
  # 构建逻辑回归公式
  formula <- as.formula(paste("dfs_3yr ~", metabolite_name))

  tryCatch({
    # 拟合逻辑回归模型
    logistic_model <- glm(formula, 
                         data = merged_data, 
                         family = binomial(link = "logit"))
    
    # 提取模型摘要
    model_summary <- summary(logistic_model)
    
    # 计算模型使用的样本信息
    n_total <- nrow(logistic_model$model)  # 模型实际使用的样本数
    n_event <- sum(merged_data$dfs_3yr == 1, na.rm = TRUE)  # 复发事件数
    
    # 计算该代谢物的缺失值数
    n_missing <- nrow(merged_data) - n_total
    # 计算模型拟合指标
    log_likelihood <- logLik(logistic_model)[1]
    aic <- AIC(logistic_model)
    null_deviance <- logistic_model$null.deviance
    residual_deviance <- logistic_model$deviance
    pseudo_r2 <- 1 - (residual_deviance / null_deviance)
    
    # 提取OR值（优势比）
    OR <- exp(model_summary$coefficients[2, 1])  # 第2行是代谢物的系数
    
    # 计算OR的95%置信区间
    conf_int <- confint(logistic_model)
    OR_lower <- exp(conf_int[2, 1])  # 代谢物的下限
    OR_upper <- exp(conf_int[2, 2])  # 代谢物的上限
    
    # 提取p值
    p_value <- model_summary$coefficients[2, 4]  # 第4列是p值
    
    # 计算模型拟合指标（可选）
    log_likelihood <- logLik(logistic_model)[1]
    aic <- AIC(logistic_model)
    null_deviance <- logistic_model$null.deviance
    residual_deviance <- logistic_model$deviance
    pseudo_r2 <- 1 - (residual_deviance / null_deviance)
    
    # 存储结果
    logistic_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
    Metabolite = metabolite_name,
    n_total = n_total,
    n_event = n_event,
    n_missing = n_missing,
    OR = OR,
    OR_lower = OR_lower,
    OR_upper = OR_upper,
    p_value = p_value,
    log_likelihood = log_likelihood,
    AIC = aic,
    pseudo_R2 = pseudo_r2,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    # 如果分析失败，存储NA值
    logistic_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = NA,
      n_event = NA,
      n_missing = sum(is.na(merged_data[[metabolite_name]])),
      OR = NA,
      OR_lower = NA,
      OR_upper = NA,
      p_value = NA,
      log_likelihood = NA,
      AIC = NA,
      pseudo_R2 = NA,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
}

# 转换结果为数据框
result_df <- do.call(rbind, logistic_results)
result_df <- as.data.frame(result_df)

# 添加代谢物名称列
result_df$Metabolite <- rownames(result_df)

# 计算FDR校正的p值
result_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(result_df$p_value, method = "BH")

# 重新排列列顺序
result_df <- result_df[, c("Metabolite", "n_total", "n_event", "n_missing", 
                           "OR", "OR_lower", "OR_upper", "p_value", "p_adj","log_likelihood", "AIC", "pseudo_R2")]

# 保存结果
fwrite(result_df, "univariate_logistic_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)


#将X4拿出来检验
a <- merged_data[,c(1,5,2868:2924)]
logit_model_a <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ X4, 
                   data = a, 
                   family = binomial(link = "logit"))
b <- summary(logit_model_a)
b
OR <- exp(b$coefficients)
OR
conf_int_a <- confint(logit_model_a)
conf_int_a
CI <- exp(conf_int_a)
CI

```
#多因素Logistic回归分析
```{r}
#多因素Logistic回归分析
library(data.table)

# 定义协变量
covariates <- c("sex", "age", "new_stage", "smoking", "bmi")

# 创建空列表存储结果
multivariate_results <- list()

# 循环进行多因素逻辑回归分析
for (i in 2:2867) {
  # 获取代谢物名称
  metabolite_name <- names(merged_data)[i]
  
  # 构建多因素逻辑回归模型公式
  formula <- as.formula(paste("dfs_3yr ~", metabolite_name, "+", 
                              paste(covariates, collapse = " + ")))
  
  # 使用tryCatch处理可能出现的错误
  tryCatch({
    # 拟合多因素逻辑回归模型
    logistic_model <- glm(formula, 
                         data = merged_data, 
                         family = binomial(link = "logit"))
    
    # 提取模型摘要
    model_summary <- summary(logistic_model)
    
    # 计算模型使用的样本信息
    n_total <- nrow(logistic_model$model)  # 模型实际使用的样本数
    
    # 计算事件数（假设dfs=1表示复发）
    # 注意：这里计算的是整个数据集中复发事件的总数
    n_event <- sum(merged_data$dfs_3yr == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    # 计算该模型中的缺失值数
    # 多因素模型中的缺失值包括代谢物和协变量的缺失
    n_missing <- nrow(merged_data) - n_total
    
    # 提取代谢物的统计量
    # 注意：在多因素模型中，代谢物通常是第一个变量（在截距之后）
    coef_index <- 1  # 代谢物在模型中的系数索引（通常为1，截距为0）
    
    # 提取代谢物的OR值
    OR <- exp(model_summary$coefficients[coef_index + 1, 1])  # +1跳过截距
    
    # 计算代谢物的OR置信区间
    conf_int <- confint(logistic_model)
    OR_lower <- exp(conf_int[coef_index + 1, 1])  # +1跳过截距
    OR_upper <- exp(conf_int[coef_index + 1, 2])  # +1跳过截距
    
    # 提取代谢物的p值
    p_value <- model_summary$coefficients[coef_index + 1, 4]  # 第4列是p值
    
    # 提取更多模型统计量（可选）
    log_likelihood <- logLik(logistic_model)[1]
    aic <- AIC(logistic_model)
    null_deviance <- logistic_model$null.deviance
    residual_deviance <- logistic_model$deviance
    pseudo_r2 <- 1 - (residual_deviance / null_deviance)
    
    # 存储结果
    multivariate_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = n_total,
      n_event = n_event,
      n_missing = n_missing,
      OR = OR,
      OR_lower = OR_lower,
      OR_upper = OR_upper,
      p_value = p_value,
      log_likelihood = log_likelihood,
      AIC = aic,
      pseudo_R2 = pseudo_r2,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    # 如果分析出错，存储NA值
    multivariate_results[[metabolite_name]] <- data.frame(
      Metabolite = metabolite_name,
      n_total = NA,
      n_event = NA,
      n_missing = NA,
      OR = NA,
      OR_lower = NA,
      OR_upper = NA,
      p_value = NA,
      log_likelihood = NA,
      AIC = NA,
      pseudo_R2 = NA,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
}

# 将结果转换为数据框
multivariate_df <- do.call(rbind, multivariate_results)
multivariate_df <- as.data.frame(multivariate_df)

# 添加代谢物名称列
multivariate_df$Metabolite <- rownames(multivariate_df)

# 计算FDR校正的p值（BH方法）
multivariate_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(multivariate_df$p_value, method = "BH")

# 重排列顺序，将代谢物名称放在第一列
multivariate_df <- multivariate_df[, c("Metabolite", "n_total", "n_event", "n_missing", 
                                       "OR", "OR_lower", "OR_upper", "p_value", "p_adj",
                                       "log_likelihood", "AIC", "pseudo_R2")]

# 保存结果为CSV文件
fwrite(multivariate_df, "multivariate_logistic_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)

#将X4拿出来检验
c <- merged_data[,c(1,5,2868:2924)]
logit_model_c <- glm(dfs_3yr ~ X4+sex+age+new_stage+smoking+bmi, 
                   data = c,family = binomial(link = "logit"))
d <- summary(logit_model_c)
d
OR <- exp(d$coefficients)
OR
conf_int_c <- confint(logit_model_c)
conf_int_c
CI <- exp(conf_int_c)
CI
```

#单独校正脂质代谢p值
```{r}
#单独校正脂质代谢p值
#library(dplyr)
#lipid_metabolome_p_adj <- read.csv("lipid_metabolome_p_adj.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# 查看数据结构
#head(lipid_metabolome_p_adj)
#str(lipid_metabolome_p_adj)
#lipid_metabolome_p_adj$class <- factor(lipid_metabolome_p_adj$class)
# 2. 新增两列p值校正结果
#lipid_metabolome_p_adj <- lipid_metabolome_p_adj %>%
#  mutate(
    # 对所有脂质代谢物进行p值校正（FDR校正）
#    p_adj_all_lipid = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH"), 
    # 对Lipid类进行p值校正（仅在Lipid类内部校正）
#    p_adj_lipid = ifelse(
#      class == "Lipid", 
#      p.adjust(p_value[class == "Lipid"], method = "BH"),  # 在Lipid内部校正
#      NA)
#  )
#summary(lipid_metabolome_p_adj)
#write.csv(lipid_metabolome_p_adj, "lipid_metabolome_p_adj.csv", row.names = FALSE)



#直接复制校正p值，推荐
library(dplyr)
lipid_metabolome_p_adj <- read.csv("lipid_metabolome_p_adj.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
# 定义关注的脂质类别
lipid_classes <- c("Lipid", "Steroids and steroid derivatives", "Fatty Acyls", 
                   "Prenol lipids", "Glycerophospholipids", "Glycerolipids", "Sphingolipids")

# 为原始数据添加唯一标识符（行号）
lipid_metabolome_p_adj$row_id <- 1:nrow(lipid_metabolome_p_adj)

# 步骤1：筛选出关注的类别并计算校正p值
lipid_data <- lipid_metabolome_p_adj %>%
  filter(class %in% lipid_classes) %>%
  group_by(class) %>%  # 按类别分组
  mutate(
    # 在每个类别内部单独校正
    p_adj_within_class = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%  # 取消分组
  mutate(
    # 在所有关注的脂质类别中一起校正
    p_adj_all_lipid = p.adjust(p_value, method = "BH")
  )

# 步骤2：合并回原始数据
lipid_metabolome_p_adj <- lipid_metabolome_p_adj %>%
  left_join(
    lipid_data %>% select(row_id, p_adj_all_lipid, p_adj_within_class),
    by = "row_id"
  ) %>%
  select(-row_id)  # 移除临时行ID

summary(lipid_metabolome_p_adj)
write.csv(lipid_metabolome_p_adj, "lipid_metabolome_p_adj.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

#检测过代谢物的215人血脂的os,dfs
```{r}
library(readr)
#Blood_lipid_215 <- read_csv("merged_data.csv")
Blood_lipid_215 <- read_csv("merged_data.csv", locale = locale(encoding = "GBK"))
Blood_lipid_215 <- Blood_lipid_215[,c(1,2868:2924)]
fwrite(Blood_lipid_215,file = "Blood_lipid_215.csv",row.names = FALSE)
summary(Blood_lipid_215)
Blood_lipid_215$sex <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$sex)
Blood_lipid_215$stage <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$stage)
Blood_lipid_215$smoking <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$smoking)
Blood_lipid_215$alcohol <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$alcohol)
Blood_lipid_215$neo_adjuvant_therapy <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$neo_adjuvant_therapy)
Blood_lipid_215$perineural_invasion <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$perineural_invasion)
Blood_lipid_215$TC <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$TC)
Blood_lipid_215$TG <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$TG)
Blood_lipid_215$HDL <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$HDL)
Blood_lipid_215$LDL <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$LDL)
Blood_lipid_215$non_HDL <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$non_HDL)
Blood_lipid_215$TG1 <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$TG1)
Blood_lipid_215$HDL1 <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$HDL1)
Blood_lipid_215$LDL1 <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$LDL1)
Blood_lipid_215$new_stage <- as.numeric(Blood_lipid_215$new_stage)
Blood_lipid_215$stage_34vs12 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$stage_34vs12)
Blood_lipid_215$Dyslipidemia <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$Dyslipidemia)
Blood_lipid_215$bmi2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$bmi2)
Blood_lipid_215$bmi3 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$bmi3)
Blood_lipid_215$TG2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$TG2)
Blood_lipid_215$TC2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$TC2)
Blood_lipid_215$HDL2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$HDL2)
Blood_lipid_215$LDL2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$LDL2)
Blood_lipid_215$non_HDL2 <- factor(Blood_lipid_215$non_HDL2)
summary(Blood_lipid_215)
```
##cox分析
###os单因素
```{r}
library(survival)
fit_os_sex<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_sex)
fit_os_age<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~age,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_age)
#fit_os_stage<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~stage,data=Blood_lipid_215)
#summary(fit_os_stage)
fit_os_bmi<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~bmi,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_bmi)
fit_os_smoking<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~smoking,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_smoking)
fit_os_alcohol<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~alcohol,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_alcohol)
fit_os_neo_adjuvant_therapy<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~neo_adjuvant_therapy,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_neo_adjuvant_therapy)
fit_os_height_cm<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~height_cm,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_height_cm)
fit_os_weight_kg<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~weight_kg,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_weight_kg)
fit_os_perineural_invasion<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_perineural_invasion)
fit_os_TG<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~TG,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_TG)
fit_os_TC<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~TC,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_TC)
fit_os_HDL<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~HDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_HDL)
fit_os_LDL<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~LDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_LDL)
fit_os_non_HDL<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~non_HDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_non_HDL)
fit_os_new_stage<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~new_stage,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_new_stage)
fit_os_stage_34vs12<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~stage_34vs12,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_stage_34vs12)
fit_os_Dyslipidemia<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_Dyslipidemia)

#分类变量
fit_os_bmi2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~bmi2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_bmi2)
fit_os_bmi3<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~bmi3,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_bmi3)
fit_os_TG2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~TG2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_TG2)
fit_os_TC2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~TC2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_TC2)
fit_os_HDL2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~HDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_HDL2)
fit_os_LDL2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~LDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_LDL2)
fit_os_non_HDL2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~non_HDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os_non_HDL2)
```
###dfs单因素
```{r}
fit_dfs_sex<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_sex)
fit_dfs_age<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~age,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_age)
#fit_dfs_stage<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~stage,data=Blood_lipid_215)
#summary(fit_dfs_stage)
fit_dfs_bmi<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~bmi,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_bmi)
fit_dfs_smoking<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~smoking,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_smoking)
fit_dfs_alcohol<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~alcohol,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_alcohol)
fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~neo_adjuvant_therapy,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy)
fit_dfs_height_cm<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~height_cm,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_height_cm)
fit_dfs_weight_kg<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~weight_kg,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_weight_kg)
fit_dfs_perineural_invasion<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_perineural_invasion)
fit_dfs_TG<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~TG,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_TG)
fit_dfs_TC<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~TC,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_TC)
fit_dfs_HDL<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~HDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_HDL)
fit_dfs_LDL<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~LDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_LDL)
fit_dfs_non_HDL<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~non_HDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_non_HDL)
fit_dfs_new_stage<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~new_stage,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_new_stage)
fit_dfs_stage_34vs12<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~stage_34vs12,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_stage_34vs12)
fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia)

#分类变量
fit_dfs_bmi2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~bmi2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_bmi2)
fit_dfs_bmi3<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~bmi3,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_bmi3)
fit_dfs_TG2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~TG2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_TG2)
fit_dfs_TC2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~TC2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_TC2)
fit_dfs_HDL2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~HDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_HDL2)
fit_dfs_LDL2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~LDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_LDL2)
fit_dfs_non_HDL2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~non_HDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs_non_HDL2)
```
###os多因素
```{r}
fit_os1<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG+TC+HDL+LDL+non_HDL+perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os1)
fit_os2<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG+HDL+LDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os2)
fit_os3<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os3)

#分类变量
fit_os4<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG2+TC2+HDL2+LDL2+non_HDL2+perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os4)
fit_os5<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG2+HDL2+LDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os5)
fit_os6<- coxph(Surv(os_time,os)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_os6)
```
###dfs多因素
```{r}
fit_dfs1<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG+TC+HDL+LDL+non_HDL+perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs1)
fit_dfs2<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG+HDL+LDL,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs2)
fit_dfs3<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs3)

#分类变量
fit_dfs4<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG2+TC2+HDL2+LDL2+non_HDL2+perineural_invasion,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs4)
fit_dfs5<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+TG2+HDL2+LDL2,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs5)
fit_dfs6<- coxph(Surv(dfs_time,dfs)~sex+age+new_stage+bmi2+smoking+alcohol+neo_adjuvant_therapy+Dyslipidemia,data=Blood_lipid_215)
summary(fit_dfs6)
```

##逻辑回归分析
###dfs单因素
```{r}
# 使用1年DFS作为结局
# 连续变量分析
library(broom)
fit_dfs_sex_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_sex_1yr)
fit_dfs_sex_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_sex_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_sex_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_age_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ age, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_age_1yr)
fit_dfs_age_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_age_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_age_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_bmi_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ bmi, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_bmi_1yr)
fit_dfs_bmi_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_bmi_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_bmi_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_smoking_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ smoking, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_smoking_1yr)
fit_dfs_smoking_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_smoking_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_smoking_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_alcohol_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ alcohol, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_alcohol_1yr)
fit_dfs_alcohol_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_alcohol_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_alcohol_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ neo_adjuvant_therapy, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy_1yr)
fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_neo_adjuvant_therapy_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_height_cm_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ height_cm, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_height_cm_1yr)
fit_dfs_height_cm_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_height_cm_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_height_cm_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_weight_kg_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ weight_kg, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_weight_kg_1yr)
fit_dfs_weight_kg_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_weight_kg_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_weight_kg_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_perineural_invasion_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ perineural_invasion, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_perineural_invasion_1yr)
fit_dfs_perineural_invasion_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_perineural_invasion_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_perineural_invasion_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_TG_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ TG, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_TG_1yr)
fit_dfs_TG_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_TG_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_TG_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_TC_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ TC, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_TC_1yr)
fit_dfs_TC_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_TC_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_TC_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_HDL_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ HDL, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_HDL_1yr)
fit_dfs_HDL_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_HDL_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_HDL_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_LDL_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ LDL, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_LDL_1yr)
fit_dfs_LDL_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_LDL_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_LDL_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_non_HDL_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ non_HDL, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_non_HDL_1yr)
fit_dfs_non_HDL_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_non_HDL_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_non_HDL_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_new_stage_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ new_stage, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_new_stage_1yr)
fit_dfs_new_stage_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_new_stage_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_new_stage_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_stage_34vs12_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ stage_34vs12, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_stage_34vs12_1yr)
fit_dfs_stage_34vs12_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_stage_34vs12_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_stage_34vs12_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ Dyslipidemia, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia_1yr)
fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_Dyslipidemia_1yr_OR

# 分类变量（重新分组后的变量）
fit_dfs_bmi2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ bmi2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_bmi2_1yr)
fit_dfs_bmi2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_bmi2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_bmi2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_bmi3_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ bmi3, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_bmi3_1yr)
fit_dfs_bmi3_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_bmi3_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_bmi3_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_TG2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ TG2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_TG2_1yr)
fit_dfs_TG2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_TG2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_TG2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_TC2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ TC2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_TC2_1yr)
fit_dfs_TC2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_TC2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_TC2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_HDL2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ HDL2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_HDL2_1yr)
fit_dfs_HDL2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_HDL2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_HDL2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_LDL2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ LDL2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_LDL2_1yr)
fit_dfs_LDL2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_LDL2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_LDL2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs_non_HDL2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ non_HDL2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs_non_HDL2_1yr)
fit_dfs_non_HDL2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs_non_HDL2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs_non_HDL2_1yr_OR
```

###dfs多因素
```{r}
# 连续变量模型
# 使用1年DFS作为结局
#fit_dfs1_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi + smoking + TG + TC + HDL + LDL + non_HDL,  data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs1_1yr)
#fit_dfs1_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs1_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
#fit_dfs1_1yr_OR

fit_dfs2_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi + smoking + TG + HDL + LDL,data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
summary(fit_dfs2_1yr)
fit_dfs2_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs2_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs2_1yr_OR

fit_dfs3_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi + smoking + Dyslipidemia, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
summary(fit_dfs3_1yr)
fit_dfs3_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs3_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs3_1yr_OR

#分类变量模型
#fit_dfs4_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi2 + smoking + TG2 + TC2 + HDL2 + LDL2 + non_HDL2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
#summary(fit_dfs4_1yr)
#fit_dfs4_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs4_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
#fit_dfs4_1yr_OR

fit_dfs5_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi2 + smoking + TG2 + HDL2 + LDL2, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
summary(fit_dfs5_1yr)
fit_dfs5_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs5_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs5_1yr_OR

fit_dfs6_1yr <- glm(dfs_1yr ~ sex + age + new_stage + bmi2 + smoking + Dyslipidemia, data = Blood_lipid_215, family = binomial)
summary(fit_dfs6_1yr)
fit_dfs6_1yr_OR <- tidy(fit_dfs6_1yr, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
fit_dfs6_1yr_OR
```
